description.es: Gestiona eventos de calendario — crear, actualizar, eliminar, listar — mediante tu agente IA. Independiente del proveedor: funciona con el calendario conectado (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Cada accion pasa por tu integracion configurada.
description.ro: Gestioneaza evenimente de calendar — creare, actualizare, stergere, listare — prin agentul tau AI. Independent de furnizor: functioneaza cu calendarul conectat (Google, Microsoft, Apple). Fiecare actiune trece prin integrarea ta configurata.

description.en: Create an event on the agent's local calendar or connected Google/Microsoft/Apple calendar. Supports weekly, biweekly, and monthly recurrence for scheduling recurring meetings like syncs and standups — each instance gets its own JoAi meeting invite link.
description.de: Erstelle einen Termin im lokalen Kalender des Agenten oder im verbundenen Google/Microsoft/Apple-Kalender. Unterstützt wöchentliche, zweiwöchentliche und monatliche Wiederholungen für regelmäßige Meetings — jede Instanz erhält einen eigenen JoAi Meeting-Einladungslink.

description.en: Delete an event from the agent's connected calendar. The call is routed to the correct provider automatically.

description.fr: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.
description.ro: List upcoming events from the agent's connected calendar within a date range.

description.en: Send personalized emails to contacts through your AI agent. The agent drafts the message from your intent, uses your configured email integration, and automatically creates a conversation room so replies route back to the right thread — no copy-paste, no lost context.
description.de: Versende personalisierte E-Mails an Kontakte über deinen KI-Agenten. Der Agent verfasst die Nachricht aus deiner Absicht, nutzt deine konfigurierte E-Mail-Integration und legt automatisch einen Gesprächsraum an, damit Antworten im richtigen Thread landen — ohne Copy-Paste, ohne verlorenen Kontext.
description.fr: Envoyez des e-mails personnalises a vos contacts via votre agent IA. L'agent redige le message a partir de votre intention, utilise votre integration e-mail configuree et cree automatiquement une salle de conversation pour que les reponses arrivent au bon endroit.
description.es: Envia correos personalizados a tus contactos mediante tu agente IA. El agente redacta el mensaje segun tu intencion, usa tu integracion de correo configurada y crea automaticamente una sala de conversacion para que las respuestas regresen al hilo correcto.
description.ro: Trimite e-mailuri personalizate catre contacte prin agentul tau AI. Agentul redacteaza mesajul din intentia ta, foloseste integrarea ta de e-mail configurata si creeaza automat o camera de conversatie astfel incat raspunsurile sa ajunga in firul corect.

description.en: Launch a followup Anthropic run using Message Batches.
description.es: Inicie una ejecución antrópica de seguimiento utilizando Message Batches.
description.fr: Lancez une exécution Anthropique de suivi à l'aide de lots de messages.
description.ro: Lansați o rulare antropică ulterioară folosind Loturi de mesaje.
description.it: Avvia una corsa Anthropic di follow-up utilizzando i batch di messaggi.

description.en: Cancel a running Claude background task. Stop an in-progress job to save resources or correct instructions before it completes.
description.de: Brich eine laufende Claude-Hintergrundaufgabe ab. Stoppe einen laufenden Job, um Ressourcen zu sparen oder Anweisungen zu korrigieren, bevor er abgeschlossen wird.
description.es: Cancele una tarea en segundo plano de Claude en ejecución. Detenga un trabajo en progreso para ahorrar recursos o corregir instrucciones antes de que se complete.
description.fr: Annulez une tâche en arrière-plan Claude en cours d'exécution. Arrêtez une tâche en cours pour économiser des ressources ou corriger des instructions avant qu'elle ne soit terminée.
description.ro: Anulați o sarcină de fundal Claude care rulează. Opriți o lucrare în desfășurare pentru a economisi resurse sau pentru a corecta instrucțiuni înainte de finalizare.
description.it: Annulla un'attività in background di Claude in esecuzione. Arresta un lavoro in corso per risparmiare risorse o correggere le istruzioni prima che venga completato.

description.en: Send a follow-up instruction through Claude Code print mode.
description.es: Envíe una instrucción de seguimiento a través del modo de impresión Claude Code.
description.fr: Envoyez une instruction de suivi via le mode d’impression Claude Code.
description.ro: Trimiteți o instrucțiune ulterioară prin modul de imprimare Claude Code.
description.it: Invia un'istruzione di follow-up tramite la modalità di stampa del codice Claude.

description.en: Request cancellation through Claude Code print mode.
description.es: Solicitar cancelación a través del modo de impresión Claude Code.
description.fr: Demander l'annulation via le mode d'impression Claude Code.
description.ro: Solicitați anularea prin modul de imprimare Claude Code.
description.it: Richiedere l'annullamento tramite la modalità stampa Codice Claude.

title.es: Obtener el estado de la tarea (Código Claude)
title.fr: Obtenir le statut de la tâche (Claude Code)

description.en: Check task status by asking Claude Code for a one-line status update.
description.es: Verifique el estado de la tarea solicitando a Claude Code una actualización de estado de una línea.
description.fr: Vérifiez l'état de la tâche en demandant à Claude Code une mise à jour de l'état sur une seule ligne.
description.ro: Verificați starea sarcinii solicitând lui Claude Code o actualizare de stare pe o singură linie.
description.it: Controlla lo stato dell'attività chiedendo a Claude Code un aggiornamento dello stato su una riga.

description.en: Launch a task through Claude Code non-interactive print mode.
description.es: Inicie una tarea a través del modo de impresión no interactivo de Claude Code.
description.fr: Lancez une tâche via le mode d'impression non interactif de Claude Code.
description.ro: Lansați o sarcină prin modul de imprimare non-interactiv Claude Code.
description.it: Avvia un'attività tramite la modalità di stampa non interattiva di Claude Code.

title.es: Obtener el estado de la tarea
title.fr: Obtenir le statut de la tâche

description.en: Check the progress of a Claude background task. See whether your job is queued, processing, or completed, and review the results when ready.
description.de: Prüfe den Fortschritt einer Claude-Hintergrundaufgabe. Sieh nach, ob dein Job in der Warteschlange steht, verarbeitet wird oder abgeschlossen ist, und rufe die Ergebnisse ab.
description.es: Verifique el progreso de una tarea en segundo plano de Claude. Vea si su trabajo está en cola, procesándose o completado, y revise los resultados cuando esté listo.
description.fr: Vérifiez la progression d'une tâche en arrière-plan Claude. Vérifiez si votre tâche est en file d'attente, en cours de traitement ou terminée, et examinez les résultats lorsqu'ils sont prêts.
description.ro: Verificați progresul unei sarcini de fundal Claude. Vedeți dacă lucrarea dvs. este pusă în coadă, procesată sau finalizată și examinați rezultatele când sunteți gata.
description.it: Controlla lo stato di avanzamento di un'attività in background di Claude. Scopri se il tuo lavoro è in coda, in elaborazione o completato e rivedi i risultati quando sono pronti.

title.en: Install JoAi app plugin for Claude
title.es: Instale el complemento de la aplicación JoAi para Claude
title.fr: Installer le plugin de l'application JoAi pour Claude
title.ro: Instalați pluginul pentru aplicația JoAi pentru Claude
title.it: Installa il plug-in dell'app JoAi per Claude

description.en: Add the official JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install any JoAi app plugin by name.
description.de: Füge den offiziellen JoAi-Claude-Marktplatz einmal hinzu und installiere danach jedes JoAi-App-Plugin per Namen.
description.es: Agregue el mercado oficial de JoAi Claude una vez y luego instale cualquier complemento de la aplicación JoAi por su nombre.
description.fr: Ajoutez une fois le marché officiel JoAi Claude, puis installez n'importe quel plugin d'application JoAi par son nom.
description.ro: Adăugați o dată piața oficială JoAi Claude, apoi instalați orice plugin pentru aplicația JoAi după nume.
description.it: Aggiungi una volta il marketplace ufficiale JoAi Claude, quindi installa qualsiasi plug-in dell'app JoAi per nome.

description.en: Launch a new background task powered by Claude. Send instructions to be processed asynchronously, ideal for long-running AI jobs like content generation, data analysis, or batch processing.
description.de: Starte eine neue Hintergrundaufgabe mit Claude. Sende Anweisungen zur asynchronen Verarbeitung, ideal für langwierige KI-Aufgaben wie Content-Erstellung, Datenanalyse oder Batch-Verarbeitung.
description.es: Inicie una nueva tarea en segundo plano impulsada por Claude. Envíe instrucciones para procesarlas de forma asincrónica, ideal para trabajos de IA de larga duración, como generación de contenido, análisis de datos o procesamiento por lotes.
description.fr: Lancez une nouvelle tâche en arrière-plan propulsée par Claude. Envoyez des instructions à traiter de manière asynchrone, ce qui est idéal pour les tâches d'IA de longue durée telles que la génération de contenu, l'analyse de données ou le traitement par lots.
description.ro: Lansați o nouă sarcină de fundal susținută de Claude. Trimiteți instrucțiuni pentru a fi procesate asincron, ideal pentru lucrări AI de lungă durată, cum ar fi generarea de conținut, analiza datelor sau procesarea în loturi.
description.it: Avvia una nuova attività in background fornita da Claude. Invia istruzioni da elaborare in modo asincrono, ideale per lavori di intelligenza artificiale di lunga durata come la generazione di contenuti, l'analisi dei dati o l'elaborazione batch.

description.en: Control native Apple apps on macOS.
description.de: Native Apple-Apps auf macOS steuern.

install.summary: Connect Apple to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
examplePrompts: List the Apple tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication Apple needs before I run an action.
Use Apple to help me with the task I describe next.
usageNotes: Every listed action becomes an MCP tool when the app server is connected.
Prefer the generated provider plugin when one is available, and fall back to the raw MCP URL otherwise.
authPrerequisites: Some actions require provider credentials or OAuth on first use.

reviewerNotes: This app wraps Apple's public warp actions behind JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
The generated submission bundle is ready for runtime validation even when marketplace screenshots have not been attached yet.
testPrompts: List the Apple tools available in this app.
What authentication does Apple require before you can use it?
Use the best Apple tool for the task I describe next.
review.demoFlow: Connect the hosted MCP URL, authenticate if prompted, then call one of the listed app actions.
review.credentialsReference: Use the same provider credentials or OAuth flow that the underlying warp actions already require.

description.en: Collect booking details and return appointment availability from the current agent calendar.
description.de: Sammelt Buchungsdetails und liefert Terminverfuegbarkeit aus dem Kalender des aktuellen Agenten.
description.fr: Collectez les details de reservation et recuperez les disponibilites depuis le calendrier de l agent actuel.
description.es: Recoge los datos de la reserva y devuelve la disponibilidad desde el calendario del agente actual.
description.ro: Colecteaza detaliile rezervarii si intoarce disponibilitatea din calendarul agentului curent.
description.it: Collect booking details and return appointment availability from the current agent calendar.

description.en: Browse available time slots and book an appointment.
description.de: Verfügbare Zeitfenster ansehen und Termin buchen.
description.es: Browse available time slots and book an appointment.
description.fr: Browse available time slots and book an appointment.
description.ro: Browse available time slots and book an appointment.
description.it: Browse available time slots and book an appointment.

description.en: Book a confirmed appointment slot for the current agent.
description.de: Bucht einen bestaetigten Termin fuer den aktuellen Agenten.
description.fr: Confirmez un creneau de rendez-vous pour l agent actuel.
description.es: Reserva un horario ya confirmado para el agente actual.
description.ro: Rezerva un interval confirmat pentru agentul curent.
description.it: Book a confirmed appointment slot for the current agent.

description.en: Get the public booking link for your appointment page. Share this link so people can book appointments with you directly.
description.de: Rufe den öffentlichen Buchungslink deiner Terminseite ab. Teile diesen Link, damit Leute direkt bei dir Termine buchen können.
description.es: Obtiene el enlace público de tu página de reservas. Comparte este enlace para que la gente pueda reservar citas directamente contigo.
description.fr: Récupère le lien public de votre page de réservation. Partagez ce lien pour que les gens puissent prendre rendez-vous directement avec vous.
description.ro: Obține linkul public al paginii tale de programări. Trimite acest link pentru ca oamenii să poată rezerva direct cu tine.
description.it: Get the public booking link for your appointment page. Share this link so people can book appointments with you directly.

description.en: Cancel an existing booked appointment and optionally provide a reason. Frees up the time slot so it becomes available for new bookings again.
description.de: Sage einen bestehenden gebuchten Termin ab und gib optional einen Grund an. Der Zeitslot wird wieder freigegeben und steht für neue Buchungen zur Verfügung.
description.fr: Annulez un rendez-vous deja reserve et ajoutez si besoin une raison. Le creneau redevient alors disponible pour de nouvelles reservations.
description.es: Cancela una cita ya reservada y, si quieres, indica el motivo. El horario quedara libre de nuevo para futuras reservas.
description.ro: Anuleaza o programare deja rezervata si, daca vrei, adauga un motiv. Intervalul devine din nou disponibil pentru alte rezervari.
description.it: Cancel an existing booked appointment and optionally provide a reason. Frees up the time slot so it becomes available for new bookings again.

description.en: Cancel a booked appointment from the public booking widget.
description.de: Einen gebuchten Termin über das öffentliche Buchungs-Widget absagen.
description.fr: Annulez un rendez-vous depuis le widget de reservation public.
description.es: Cancela una cita reservada desde el widget de reserva publico.
description.ro: Anuleaza o programare din widgetul public de rezervare.
description.it: Cancel a booked appointment from the public booking widget.

description.en: Open and update the appointment configuration for this agent.
description.de: Termineinstellungen dieses Agenten anzeigen und bearbeiten.
description.es: Open and update the appointment configuration for this agent.
description.fr: Open and update the appointment configuration for this agent.
description.ro: Open and update the appointment configuration for this agent.
description.it: Open and update the appointment configuration for this agent.

description.en: View a confirmed appointment with calendar download and join link. Share this page so attendees can add the meeting to their calendar.
description.de: Zeige einen bestätigten Termin mit Kalender-Download und Teilnahmelink. Teile diese Seite, damit Teilnehmer den Termin in ihren Kalender eintragen können.
description.fr: Consulte un rendez-vous confirmé avec téléchargement calendrier et lien de participation. Partage cette page pour que les participants puissent ajouter la réunion à leur calendrier.
description.es: Consulta una cita confirmada con descarga de calendario y enlace de unión. Comparte esta página para que los asistentes puedan añadir la reunión a su calendario.
description.ro: Vizualizează o programare confirmată cu descărcare calendar și link de participare. Trimite această pagină pentru ca participanții să poată adăuga întâlnirea în calendar.
description.it: View a confirmed appointment with calendar download and join link. Share this page so attendees can add the meeting to their calendar.

description.en: Sends a booking confirmation email to the attendee after an appointment is booked.
description.de: Sendet eine Buchungsbestätigungs-E-Mail an den Teilnehmer nach einer Terminbuchung.
description.fr: Envoie un e-mail de confirmation au participant apres la reservation du rendez-vous.
description.es: Envia un correo de confirmacion a la persona asistente despues de reservar la cita.
description.ro: Trimite un e-mail de confirmare participantului dupa ce programarea a fost rezervata.
description.it: Sends a booking confirmation email to the attendee after an appointment is booked.

description.en: Start appointment onboarding by opening calendar integration setup for this agent.
description.de: Starte das Termin-Onboarding, indem die Kalender-Integration für diesen Agenten geöffnet wird.
description.fr: Lancez la configuration des rendez-vous en ouvrant l integration calendrier de cet agent.
description.es: Inicia la configuracion de citas abriendo la integracion de calendario de este agente.
description.ro: Porneste configurarea programarilor deschizand integrarea de calendar pentru acest agent.
description.it: Start appointment onboarding by opening calendar integration setup for this agent.

description.en: Save the appointment booking policy for your agent. Configure timezone, office hours, slot intervals, buffer times, minimum notice periods, and available services.
description.de: Speichere die Terminbuchungsrichtlinie für deinen Agenten. Konfiguriere Zeitzone, Geschäftszeiten, Slot-Intervalle, Pufferzeiten, Mindestvorlaufzeiten und verfügbare Dienstleistungen.
description.fr: Enregistrez la politique de reservation de rendez-vous de votre agent. Configurez le fuseau horaire, les horaires d ouverture, les intervalles de creneaux, les temps tampon, le delai minimum et les services disponibles.
description.es: Guarda la politica de reservas de tu agente. Configura la zona horaria, el horario laboral, los intervalos, los margenes, el aviso minimo y los servicios disponibles.
description.ro: Salveaza politica de programari a agentului tau. Configureaza fusul orar, programul, intervalele sloturilor, timpii tampon, timpul minim de preaviz si serviciile disponibile.
description.it: Save the appointment booking policy for your agent. Configure timezone, office hours, slot intervals, buffer times, minimum notice periods, and available services.

description.en: Notify team members about a new appointment request that needs manual approval. Used by service businesses like barbers, restaurants, and consultants to review and approve customer booking requests.
description.de: Benachrichtigt Teammitglieder über eine neue Terminanfrage, die manuell bestätigt werden muss. Wird von Dienstleistern wie Friseuren, Restaurants und Beratern genutzt, um Kundenbuchungen zu prüfen und freizugeben.

description.en: Create an appointment request when an appointment cannot be booked natively.
description.de: Erstellt eine Terminanfrage, wenn ein Termin nicht direkt gebucht werden kann.
description.fr: Creez une demande de rendez-vous lorsqu un rendez-vous ne peut pas etre reserve directement.
description.es: Crea una solicitud de cita cuando la reserva no pueda completarse de forma directa.
description.ro: Creeaza o cerere de programare atunci cand rezervarea nu poate fi facuta direct.
description.it: Create an appointment request when an appointment cannot be booked natively.

description.en: Reschedule an existing booked appointment to a new confirmed slot.
description.de: Verschiebt einen bestehenden gebuchten Termin auf einen neuen bestaetigten Slot.
description.fr: Reprogrammez un rendez-vous deja reserve sur un nouveau creneau confirme.
description.es: Reprograma una cita ya reservada a un nuevo horario confirmado.
description.ro: Reprogrameaza o programare existenta intr-un nou interval confirmat.
description.it: Reschedule an existing booked appointment to a new confirmed slot.

description.en: You have been issued a digital certificate on the blockchain. Connect your wallet to claim it.
description.de: Dir wurde ein digitales Zertifikat auf der Blockchain ausgestellt. Verbinde deine Wallet, um es einzulösen.
description.fr: Un certificat numérique sur la blockchain vous a été émis. Connectez votre portefeuille pour le réclamer.
description.es: Se te ha emitido un certificado digital en la blockchain. Conecta tu wallet para reclamarlo.
description.ro: Ți-a fost emis un certificat digital pe blockchain. Conectează-ți wallet-ul pentru a-l revendica.
description.it: You have been issued a digital certificate on the blockchain. Connect your wallet to claim it.

description.en: Create an NFT collection on the blockchain for issuing digital certificates. Each collection represents a certificate type (e.g. Innovationssiegel, Completion, Compliance).
description.de: Erstelle eine NFT-Kollektion auf der Blockchain zum Ausstellen digitaler Zertifikate. Jede Kollektion steht für einen Zertifikattyp (z.B. Innovationssiegel, Abschluss, Compliance).
description.fr: Créez une collection NFT sur la blockchain pour émettre des certificats numériques. Chaque collection représente un type de certificat.
description.es: Crea una colección NFT en la blockchain para emitir certificados digitales. Cada colección representa un tipo de certificado.
description.ro: Creează o colecție NFT pe blockchain pentru a emite certificate digitale. Fiecare colecție reprezintă un tip de certificat.
description.it: Create an NFT collection on the blockchain for issuing digital certificates. Each collection represents a certificate type (e.g. Innovationssiegel, Completion, Compliance).

description.en: Upload a PDF and issue a verifiable digital certificate on the blockchain. The recipient gets an email to claim it.
description.de: PDF hochladen und ein verifizierbares digitales Zertifikat auf der Blockchain ausstellen. Der Empfänger erhält eine E-Mail zum Einlösen.
description.fr: Téléchargez un PDF et émettez un certificat numérique vérifiable sur la blockchain. Le destinataire reçoit un email pour le réclamer.
description.es: Sube un PDF y emite un certificado digital verificable en la blockchain. El destinatario recibe un email para reclamarlo.
description.ro: Încarcă un PDF și emite un certificat digital verificabil pe blockchain. Destinatarul primește un email pentru a-l revendica.
description.it: Upload a PDF and issue a verifiable digital certificate on the blockchain. The recipient gets an email to claim it.

description.en: View all digital certificates you have issued on the blockchain.
description.de: Alle digitalen Zertifikate ansehen, die du auf der Blockchain ausgestellt hast.
description.fr: Consultez tous les certificats numériques que vous avez émis sur la blockchain.
description.es: Ve todos los certificados digitales que has emitido en la blockchain.
description.ro: Vizualizează toate certificatele digitale pe care le-ai emis pe blockchain.
description.it: View all digital certificates you have issued on the blockchain.

description.en: Permanently revoke a certificate you issued. This action cannot be undone.
description.de: Ein von dir ausgestelltes Zertifikat dauerhaft widerrufen. Diese Aktion kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
description.fr: Révoquer définitivement un certificat que vous avez émis. Cette action est irréversible.
description.es: Revocar permanentemente un certificado que emitiste. Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
description.ro: Revocă permanent un certificat pe care l-ai emis. Această acțiune nu poate fi anulată.
description.it: Permanently revoke a certificate you issued. This action cannot be undone.

description.en: Check the authenticity and validity of a digital certificate on the blockchain by its ID.
description.de: Echtheit und Gültigkeit eines digitalen Zertifikats auf der Blockchain anhand seiner ID prüfen.
description.fr: Vérifiez l'authenticité et la validité d'un certificat numérique sur la blockchain par son identifiant.
description.es: Comprueba la autenticidad y validez de un certificado digital en la blockchain por su ID.
description.ro: Verifică autenticitatea și valabilitatea unui certificat digital pe blockchain după ID-ul său.
description.it: Check the authenticity and validity of a digital certificate on the blockchain by its ID.

description.en: Stake-backed personal challenges. Put money on the line and prove it.
description.de: Persönliche Challenges mit echtem Einsatz. Setz etwas aufs Spiel und beweise es.
description.fr: Defis personnels avec mise en jeu. Mettez quelque chose en jeu et prouvez-le.
description.es: Retos personales con dinero en juego. Pon algo en riesgo y demuestralo.
description.ro: Provocari personale sustinute de o miza. Pune ceva in joc si demonstreaza.

description.en: Match the stake and bet that the challenger will fail. If they skip — you take it.
description.de: Gleiche den Einsatz aus und wette darauf, dass der Challenger scheitert. Wenn er aufgibt — nimmst du den Einsatz.
description.fr: Alignez la mise et pariez que le createur du defi echouera. S il abandonne, vous remportez la mise.
description.es: Iguala la apuesta y juega a que quien lanzo el reto va a fallar. Si no lo cumple, la apuesta es para ti.
description.ro: Egalizeaza miza si pariaza ca initiatorul provocarii va esua. Daca renunta, castigi miza.
description.it: Match the stake and bet that the challenger will fail. If they skip — you take it.

description.en: Commit to something and stake tokens on it. If you prove it — you keep your stake. If you skip — the challenger takes it.
description.de: Verpflichte dich zu etwas und setze Token darauf. Wenn du es beweist, behältst du deinen Einsatz. Wenn nicht — bekommt ihn der Challenger.
description.fr: Engagez-vous sur un objectif et misez des tokens dessus. Si vous tenez parole, vous recupererez votre mise. Sinon, elle revient a l adversaire.
description.es: Comprometete con algo y pon tokens en juego. Si lo cumples, recuperas tu apuesta. Si fallas, se la queda quien acepte el reto.
description.ro: Asuma-ti un obiectiv si pune tokenuri la bataie. Daca reusesti, iti pastrezi miza. Daca nu, o castiga persoana care accepta provocarea.
description.it: Commit to something and stake tokens on it. If you prove it — you keep your stake. If you skip — the challenger takes it.

description.en: Browse open challenges waiting for someone to take the bet.
description.de: Offene Challenges, die auf einen Challenger warten.
description.fr: Parcourez les defis ouverts en attente de quelqu un pour prendre le pari.
description.es: Explora los retos abiertos que esperan a alguien que acepte la apuesta.
description.ro: Exploreaza provocarile deschise care asteapta pe cineva sa accepte pariul.
description.it: Browse open challenges waiting for someone to take the bet.

description.en: Mark a challenge as succeeded or failed after verification. Owner only.
description.de: Challenge nach Überprüfung als erfolgreich oder gescheitert markieren. Nur für Eigentümer.
description.fr: Marquez un defi comme reussi ou echoue apres verification. Reserve au proprietaire.
description.es: Marca un reto como superado o fallido tras verificarlo. Solo para el propietario.
description.ro: Marcheaza provocarea ca reusita sau esuata dupa verificare. Doar pentru proprietar.
description.it: Mark a challenge as succeeded or failed after verification. Owner only.

description.en: See the details, stake, and status of a challenge.
description.de: Details, Einsatz und Status einer Challenge ansehen.
description.fr: Consultez les details, la mise et le statut d un defi.
description.es: Consulta los detalles, la apuesta y el estado del reto.
description.ro: Vezi detaliile, miza si starea provocarii.
description.it: See the details, stake, and status of a challenge.

description.en: Play fully on-chain chess on MultiversX. Create games, challenge opponents, and make moves — all recorded immutably on the blockchain.
description.de: Spiele komplett On-Chain-Schach auf MultiversX. Erstelle Spiele, fordere Gegner heraus und ziehe — alles unveränderlich auf der Blockchain gespeichert.

description.en: Join an open chess game on MultiversX as the black player. The game starts as soon as both players have joined.

description.ro: Browse available discount coupons and claim one to your wallet.
description.it: Browse available discount coupons and claim one to your wallet.

description.en: Claim a discount coupon to your wallet. The coupon is sent as an SFT that you hold until you redeem it.
description.de: Beanspruche einen Rabattgutschein in deiner Wallet. Der Gutschein wird als SFT gesendet, den du bis zur Einlösung behältst.
description.fr: Réclamez un coupon de réduction dans votre wallet. Le coupon est envoyé comme SFT que vous conservez jusqu'à l'utilisation.
description.es: Reclama un cupón de descuento en tu wallet. El cupón se envía como SFT que mantienes hasta canjearlo.
description.ro: Revendică un cupon de reducere în wallet-ul tău. Cuponul este trimis ca SFT pe care îl păstrezi până la utilizare.
description.it: Claim a discount coupon to your wallet. The coupon is sent as an SFT that you hold until you redeem it.

description.en: Create a discount coupon as an SFT in your collection. Customers can claim and hold the coupon in their wallet, then redeem it at checkout. All details are stored on-chain.
description.de: Erstelle einen Rabattgutschein als SFT in deiner Kollektion. Kunden können den Gutschein in ihrer Wallet halten und beim Bezahlen einlösen. Alle Details sind on-chain gespeichert.
description.fr: Créez un coupon de réduction en tant que SFT dans votre collection. Les clients peuvent le conserver dans leur wallet et l'utiliser au paiement. Tout est stocké on-chain.
description.es: Crea un cupón de descuento como SFT en tu colección. Los clientes pueden reclamarlo y mantenerlo en su wallet, luego canjearlo al pagar. Todo está almacenado on-chain.
description.ro: Creează un cupon de reducere ca SFT în colecția ta. Clienții pot revendica și păstra cuponul în wallet, apoi folosi la plată. Totul este stocat on-chain.
description.it: Create a discount coupon as an SFT in your collection. Customers can claim and hold the coupon in their wallet, then redeem it at checkout. All details are stored on-chain.

description.en: Create an SFT collection on the blockchain for your discount coupons. Each collection groups all coupons for a brand or campaign. Requires 0.05 EGLD for the ESDT issuance fee.
description.de: Erstelle eine SFT-Kollektion auf der Blockchain für deine Rabattgutscheine. Jede Kollektion gruppiert alle Gutscheine einer Marke oder Kampagne. Erfordert 0.05 EGLD für die ESDT-Erstellung.
description.fr: Créez une collection SFT sur la blockchain pour vos coupons de réduction. Chaque collection regroupe les coupons d'une marque ou campagne. Requiert 0.05 EGLD pour l'émission ESDT.
description.es: Crea una colección SFT en la blockchain para tus cupones de descuento. Cada colección agrupa los cupones de una marca o campaña. Requiere 0.05 EGLD para la emisión ESDT.
description.ro: Creează o colecție SFT pe blockchain pentru cupoanele tale de reducere. Fiecare colecție grupează cupoanele unei mărci sau campanii. Necesită 0.05 EGLD pentru emiterea ESDT.
description.it: Create an SFT collection on the blockchain for your discount coupons. Each collection groups all coupons for a brand or campaign. Requires 0.05 EGLD for the ESDT issuance fee.

description.en: View all discount coupons you have created on-chain.
description.de: Alle on-chain erstellten Rabattgutscheine ansehen.
description.fr: Voir tous les coupons de réduction que vous avez créés on-chain.
description.es: Ver todos los cupones de descuento que has creado on-chain.
description.ro: Vezi toate cupoanele de reducere create de tine on-chain.
description.it: View all discount coupons you have created on-chain.

description.en: View and manage your discount coupons — revoke, check status.
description.de: Rabattgutscheine anzeigen und verwalten — widerrufen, Status prüfen.
description.es: View and manage your discount coupons — revoke, check status.
description.fr: View and manage your discount coupons — revoke, check status.
description.ro: View and manage your discount coupons — revoke, check status.
description.it: View and manage your discount coupons — revoke, check status.

description.en: Redeem a coupon SFT from your wallet at checkout. Send the coupon token to the contract — it gets burned and the discount is returned.
description.de: Löse einen Gutschein-SFT aus deiner Wallet beim Bezahlen ein. Sende den Token an den Contract — er wird verbrannt und der Rabatt wird zurückgegeben.
description.fr: Utilisez un coupon SFT de votre wallet au paiement. Envoyez le token au contrat — il est brûlé et la réduction est retournée.
description.es: Canjea un cupón SFT de tu wallet al pagar. Envía el token al contrato — se quema y el descuento se devuelve.
description.ro: Folosește un cupon SFT din wallet-ul tău la plată. Trimite token-ul către contract — este ars și reducerea este returnată.
description.it: Redeem a coupon SFT from your wallet at checkout. Send the coupon token to the contract — it gets burned and the discount is returned.

description.en: Permanently deactivate a coupon. Remaining SFTs are burned and customers can no longer claim or redeem it.
description.de: Einen Gutschein dauerhaft deaktivieren. Verbleibende SFTs werden verbrannt und Kunden können ihn nicht mehr beanspruchen oder einlösen.
description.fr: Désactivez définitivement un coupon. Les SFT restants sont brûlés et les clients ne peuvent plus le réclamer ni l'utiliser.
description.es: Desactiva permanentemente un cupón. Los SFT restantes se queman y los clientes ya no pueden reclamarlo ni canjearlo.
description.ro: Dezactivează definitiv un cupon. SFT-urile rămase sunt arse și clienții nu îl mai pot revendica sau folosi.
description.it: Permanently deactivate a coupon. Remaining SFTs are burned and customers can no longer claim or redeem it.

description.en: Look up a coupon by code — see the discount, usage count, expiry, and status.
description.de: Gutscheincode nachschlagen — Rabatt, Nutzungsanzahl, Ablaufdatum und Status ansehen.
description.fr: Recherchez un coupon par code — voyez la réduction, les utilisations, l'expiration et le statut.
description.es: Consulta un cupón por código — ve el descuento, usos, vencimiento y estado.
description.ro: Caută un cupon după cod — vezi reducerea, numărul de utilizări, expirarea și statusul.
description.it: Look up a coupon by code — see the discount, usage count, expiry, and status.

description.en: Create and manage AI-powered coding agents that work autonomously on your repositories. Automate code changes, workflows, and pull requests with Cursor's Cloud Agents API.
description.de: Erstelle und verwalte KI-gestützte Coding-Agenten, die autonom an deinen Repositories arbeiten. Automatisiere Code-Änderungen, Workflows und Pull Requests mit Cursors Cloud Agents API.

install.summary: Connect Cursor to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
examplePrompts: List the Cursor tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication Cursor needs before I run an action.
Use Cursor to help me with the task I describe next.
usageNotes: Every listed action becomes an MCP tool when the app server is connected.
Prefer the generated provider plugin when one is available, and fall back to the raw MCP URL otherwise.
authPrerequisites: Some actions require provider credentials or OAuth on first use.

reviewerNotes: This app wraps Cursor's public warp actions behind JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
The generated submission bundle is ready for runtime validation even when marketplace screenshots have not been attached yet.
testPrompts: List the Cursor tools available in this app.
What authentication does Cursor require before you can use it?
Use the best Cursor tool for the task I describe next.
review.demoFlow: Connect the hosted MCP URL, authenticate if prompted, then call one of the listed app actions.
review.credentialsReference: Use the same provider credentials or OAuth flow that the underlying warp actions already require.

claude.title: Claude Plugin
claude.description: Add the official JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this app plugin by name.

primaryAction.label: Copy marketplace command
primaryAction.value: claude plugin marketplace add --scope user JoAiHQ/claude-plugins

notes: Add the JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this plugin by name.

codex.title: Codex Plugin
codex.description: Install this app from the official JoAi Codex marketplace, or use the MCP URL if your Codex build still relies on direct MCP setup.
notes: Add the JoAi Codex marketplace in Codex first, then install this plugin by name.

cursor.title: Cursor Plugin
cursor.description: Install this app in Cursor with one click, or fall back to the hosted MCP URL manually.
notes: The one-click install opens Cursor directly with this app prefilled.

openai.title: ChatGPT App
openai.description: Use this app in ChatGPT today by connecting the hosted MCP URL.
notes: Paste the hosted MCP URL into ChatGPT to connect the app today.

description.en: Add a followup instruction to an existing cloud agent. Provide additional tasks or modifications for the agent to execute.

description.en: Automatically identify customers with birthdays in the next 7 days.

description.en: View and manage your follow-up pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, and reply status in one overview.

description.it: View and manage your follow-up pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, and reply status in one overview.

description.en: Enroll a CRM contact into a follow-up sequence by setting the sequence name and step. The host system schedules execution of the appropriate template.
description.de: Einen CRM-Kontakt in eine Follow-up-Sequenz aufnehmen, indem der Sequenz-Name und Schritt gesetzt werden. Das Host-System plant die Ausführung des entsprechenden Templates.
description.es: Enroll a CRM contact into a follow-up sequence by setting the sequence name and step. The host system schedules execution of the appropriate template.

description.it: Enroll a CRM contact into a follow-up sequence by setting the sequence name and step. The host system schedules execution of the appropriate template.

description.en: Execute one step of a follow-up sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.
description.de: Einen Schritt einer Follow-up-Sequenz für einen Kontakt ausführen: Kontakt und passendes Template laden, Nachricht personalisieren, je nach Kanal senden oder protokollieren, dann zum nächsten Schritt weiterrücken.

description.ro: Execute one step of a follow-up sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.
description.it: Execute one step of a follow-up sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.

description.en: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.
description.de: Erfassen, dass ein Kontakt auf eine Follow-up-Nachricht geantwortet hat. Markiert den Kontakt als 'followups-replied', damit die Sequenz gestoppt und die Antwort angemessen behandelt werden kann.
description.es: Record that a contact replied to a follow-up message. Tags the contact as 'followups-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled appropriately.

description.de: Automatisch Kunden identifizieren, die seit 30+ Tagen nicht mehr da waren, und Follow-up-Aktionen vorschlagen.

description.ro: Identifica automat clientii care nu au vizitat de peste 30 de zile si sugereaza actiuni de follow-up.
description.it: Automatically identify customers who haven't visited in 30+ days and suggest follow-up actions.

description.de: Einen Kunden daran erinnern, dass es Zeit ist, ein zuvor gekauftes Produkt nachzubestellen.
description.fr: Rappeler a un client qu il est temps de recommander un produit achete precedemment.

description.it: Remind a customer that it's time to reorder a product they purchased previously.

title.fr: Retirer un contact d'une séquence de suivi
title.es: Eliminar contacto de la secuencia de seguimiento
title.ro: Elimină contactul din secvența de follow-up
title.it: Rimuovi contatto dalla sequenza di follow-up

description.en: Remove a contact from a follow-up sequence. Clears the sequence properties, removes the enrolled tag, and logs the removal as an activity. Use this when a contact opts out or was enrolled by mistake.
description.de: Einen Kontakt aus einer Follow-up-Sequenz entfernen. Löscht die Sequenz-Eigenschaften, entfernt den enrolled-Tag und protokolliert die Entfernung als Aktivität. Verwende dies, wenn ein Kontakt widerspricht oder versehentlich angemeldet wurde.
description.fr: Retirer un contact d'une séquence de suivi. Efface les propriétés de la séquence, supprime le tag enrolled et enregistre le retrait comme activité. À utiliser lorsqu'un contact se désiste ou a été inscrit par erreur.
description.es: Eliminar un contacto de una secuencia de seguimiento. Limpia las propiedades de la secuencia, elimina la etiqueta enrolled y registra la eliminación como actividad. Úsalo cuando un contacto opta por no participar o fue inscrito por error.
description.ro: Elimină un contact dintr-o secvență de follow-up. Șterge proprietățile secvenței, elimină tag-ul enrolled și înregistrează eliminarea ca activitate. Folosește când un contact se retrage sau a fost înscris din greșeală.
description.it: Rimuovi un contatto da una sequenza di follow-up. Cancella le proprietà della sequenza, rimuove il tag enrolled e registra la rimozione come attività. Usalo quando un contatto rinuncia o è stato iscritto per errore.

description.en: Create a reusable follow-up message template with structured metadata like channel, sequence step, and delay. Pre-fills type=template and app=followups, then chains to the generic document-create warp so the actual storage logic stays in one place.
description.de: Ein wiederverwendbares Follow-up-Nachrichten-Template mit strukturierten Metadaten wie Kanal, Sequenz-Schritt und Verzögerung erstellen. Setzt type=template und app=followups voraus und chained dann zum generischen document-create Warp, damit die eigentliche Speicherlogik an einer Stelle bleibt.
description.es: Create a reusable follow-up message template with structured metadata like channel, sequence step, and delay. Pre-fills type=template and app=followups, then chains to the generic document-create warp so the actual storage logic stays in one place.
description.fr: Create a reusable follow-up message template with structured metadata like channel, sequence step, and delay. Pre-fills type=template and app=followups, then chains to the generic document-create warp so the actual storage logic stays in one place.
description.ro: Create a reusable follow-up message template with structured metadata like channel, sequence step, and delay. Pre-fills type=template and app=followups, then chains to the generic document-create warp so the actual storage logic stays in one place.

description.en: Permanently delete a follow-up message template from your agent's knowledge base. This cannot be undone — use with care.
description.de: Ein Follow-up-Nachrichten-Template dauerhaft aus der Wissensdatenbank deines Agenten löschen. Dies kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden — mit Vorsicht verwenden.
description.fr: Supprimer définitivement un modèle de message de suivi de la base de connaissances de votre agent. Cette action est irréversible — à utiliser avec précaution.
description.es: Eliminar permanentemente una plantilla de mensaje de seguimiento de la base de conocimientos de tu agente. Esta acción no se puede deshacer — úsala con cuidado.
description.ro: Șterge permanent un template de mesaj de follow-up din baza de cunoștințe a agentului tău. Această acțiune este ireversibilă — folosește cu atenție.
description.it: Elimina permanentemente un template di messaggio di follow-up dalla knowledge base del tuo agente. Questa azione non può essere annullata — usala con cautela.

description.en: List all reusable follow-up message templates for automated sequences. Optionally filter by search term to find specific templates quickly.
description.de: Alle wiederverwendbaren Follow-up-Nachrichten-Templates für automatisierte Sequenzen auflisten. Optional nach Suchbegriff filtern, um bestimmte Templates schnell zu finden.

description.es: Listar todas las plantillas de mensajes de seguimiento reutilizables para secuencias automatizadas. Filtrar opcionalmente por término de búsqueda para encontrar plantillas específicas rápidamente.
description.ro: Listează toate template-urile de mesaje de follow-up reutilizabile pentru secvențe automatizate. Filtrează opțional după termen de căutare pentru a găsi rapid template-uri specifice.
description.it: Elenca tutti i template di messaggi di follow-up riutilizzabili per sequenze automatizzate. Filtra opzionalmente per termine di ricerca per trovare rapidamente template specifici.

description.en: Update an existing follow-up message template's title, content, channel, step, delay, or variables. Only the fields you provide will be changed.
description.de: Ein bestehendes Follow-up-Nachrichten-Template aktualisieren: Titel, Inhalt, Kanal, Schritt, Verzögerung oder Variablen. Nur die angegebenen Felder werden geändert.

description.ro: Actualizează titlul, conținutul, canalul, pasul, întârzierea sau variabilele unui template de mesaj de follow-up existent. Doar câmpurile furnizate vor fi modificate.
description.it: Aggiorna il titolo, il contenuto, il canale, il passo, il ritardo o le variabili di un template di messaggio di follow-up esistente. Solo i campi forniti verranno modificati.

description.en: Reach out to an inactive customer with a personalized win-back message and optional offer.
description.de: Einen inaktiven Kunden mit einer personalisierten Win-back-Nachricht und optionalem Angebot kontaktieren.

description.it: Create a private warp app scoped to your team, so you can publish private warps under your own brand.

description.en: Create a private warp under your brand that calls a custom endpoint — enabling your agent to trigger private automations.
description.de: Erstelle einen privaten Warp unter deiner Marke, der einen eigenen Endpunkt aufruft — damit dein Agent private Automatisierungen auslösen kann.

description.en: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.
description.de: Ersetze die Definition eines bestehenden privaten Warps — nützlich, um eine Automatisierung zu verfeinern oder einen Flow zu korrigieren.
description.es: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.

description.it: Replace the definition of an existing private warp — useful when refining an automation or fixing a flow.

description.en: Price in cents for the base product. For variations, set each variation's price in the input below.
description.de: Preis in Cent für das Basisprodukt. Bei Varianten den Preis jeder Variante unten eingeben.

description.en: View all products and materials in your team catalog with names and prices.
description.de: Alle Produkte und Materialien im Team-Katalog mit Namen und Preisen anzeigen.

title.en: Add a variation to a product

description.en: Add a pricing variation to an existing product. Each variation has its own SKU, name, price per unit, type, and optional meta attributes (e.g. volume ranges for tiered pricing). Use this for volume discounts, size variants, or multi-tier pricing.
description.de: Füge eine Preisvariante zu einem bestehenden Produkt hinzu. Jede Variante hat eigene SKU, Namen, Preis pro Einheit, Typ und optionale Meta-Attribute (z.B. Mengenbereiche für Staffelpreise). Verwende dies für Mengenrabatte, Größenvarianten oder Preisstaffeln.

description.en: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.de: Erstelle ein neues Projekt für deinen Agenten, um Arbeit, Content-Produktion oder laufende Initiativen zu organisieren.
description.es: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.fr: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.ro: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.
description.it: Create a new project for your agent to organize work, content production, or ongoing initiatives.

description.en: Permanently remove a project from your agent.
description.de: Entferne ein Projekt dauerhaft von deinem Agenten.
description.es: Permanently remove a project from your agent.
description.fr: Permanently remove a project from your agent.
description.ro: Permanently remove a project from your agent.
description.it: Permanently remove a project from your agent.

description.en: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.
description.de: Plane eine Erinnerung, damit dein KI-Agent dich zur richtigen Zeit benachrichtigt. Egal ob Meeting, Follow-up oder persönliche Erledigung — dein Agent schickt dir rechtzeitig eine Benachrichtigung, damit nichts untergeht.
description.es: Schedule a reminder so your AI agent notifies you at the right time. Whether it's a meeting, a follow-up, or a personal errand, your agent will send you a timely notification so nothing slips through the cracks.

description.it: Permanently remove a reminder so your agent no longer triggers it.

description.en: Create a new billable service with name, price, and pricing model for your team catalog. Services can be one-time or monthly subscription. Monthly services use Stripe for recurring billing.
description.de: Erstelle eine neue abrechenbare Dienstleistung mit Name, Preis und Abrechnungsmodell für deinen Team-Katalog. Dienstleistungen können einmalig oder monatlich als Abo sein. Monatliche Services nutzen Stripe für wiederkehrende Zahlungen.

description.en: Permanently remove a service from your team catalog. Deleted services can no longer be booked or used on invoices.
description.de: Eine Dienstleistung dauerhaft aus deinem Team-Katalog entfernen. Gelöschte Dienstleistungen können nicht mehr gebucht oder auf Rechnungen verwendet werden.

description.en: View all services and hourly rates in your team catalog with names, prices and durations.
description.de: Alle Dienstleistungen und Stundensätze im Team-Katalog mit Namen, Preisen und Dauern anzeigen.

description.en: Update an existing service's name, price, duration, or description in your team catalog. Changes apply immediately to new bookings and invoices.
description.de: Eine bestehende Dienstleistung mit aktualisiertem Namen, Preis, Dauer oder Beschreibung in deinem Team-Katalog bearbeiten. Änderungen gelten sofort für neue Buchungen und Rechnungen.

description.de: Stellt eine Markenseite für das Team bereit. Erstellt die Seite, falls sie noch nicht existiert, andernfalls wird die bestehende zurückgegeben.

description.de: Füge deinem Agenten eine neue Fähigkeit hinzu und gib ihm spezialisiertes Wissen oder eine definierte Fähigkeit, die er nutzen kann.

description.en: Record a new data point in a tracked store (e.g. log weight, add expense, track habit).
description.de: Erfasse einen neuen Datenpunkt in einem Datenspeicher (z.B. Gewicht, Ausgabe, Gewohnheit).

description.de: Erstelle einen neuen Datenspeicher für Zeitreihen- oder Einzelwerte (Gewicht, Ausgaben, Gewohnheiten usw.).

description.de: Einen Datenspeicher und alle seine Einträge löschen.

description.ro: Stop tracking and delete a data store and all its entries.
description.it: Stop tracking and delete a data store and all its entries.

description.en: Get the current scalar value from a named store. Returns the most recent entry's value for status pages, counters, and configuration.
description.de: Den aktuellen skalaren Wert aus einem benannten Store abrufen. Gibt den Wert des letzten Eintrags für Statusseiten, Zähler und Konfiguration zurück.
description.es: Obtén el valor escalar actual de un store con nombre. Devuelve el valor de la entrada más reciente para páginas de estado, contadores y configuración.
description.fr: Obtenir la valeur scalaire actuelle d'un store nommé. Renvoie la valeur de l'entrée la plus récente pour les pages de statut, les compteurs et la configuration.
description.ro: Obține valoarea scalară curentă dintr-un store denumit. Returnează valoarea celei mai recente intrări pentru pagini de stare, contoare și configurare.
description.it: Ottieni il valore scalare corrente da uno store nominato. Restituisce il valore dell'ultimo inserimento per pagine di stato, contatori e configurazione.

description.en: List all tracked data stores and their status.
description.de: Alle Datenspeicher und ihren Status auflisten.
description.es: List all tracked data stores and their status.
description.fr: List all tracked data stores and their status.
description.ro: List all tracked data stores and their status.
description.it: List all tracked data stores and their status.

description.en: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.de: Einträge eines Datenspeichers abfragen und mit optionalen Datumsfiltern anzeigen.
description.es: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.fr: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.ro: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.
description.it: Query and view entries from a tracked data store with optional date filters.

description.en: Set a value in a simple field. Fields are key-value pairs for status pages, counters, or configuration data. Each set overwrites the previous value.
description.de: Setzt einen Wert in einem einfachen Feld. Felder sind Schlüssel-Wert-Paare für Statusseiten, Zähler oder Konfigurationsdaten. Jedes Setzen überschreibt den vorherigen Wert.
description.es: Establece un valor en un campo simple. Los campos son pares clave-valor para páginas de estado, contadores o datos de configuración. Cada establecimiento sobrescribe el valor anterior.
description.fr: Définit une valeur dans un champ simple. Les champs sont des paires clé-valeur pour les pages de statut, les compteurs ou les données de configuration. Chaque définition écrase la valeur précédente.
description.ro: Setează o valoare într-un câmp simplu. Câmpurile sunt perechi cheie-valoare pentru pagini de status, contoare sau date de configurare. Fiecare setare suprascrie valoarea anterioară.
description.it: Imposta un valore in un campo semplice. I campi sono coppie chiave-valore per pagine di stato, contatori o dati di configurazione. Ogni impostazione sovrascrive il valore precedente.

description.en: Toggle a simple field between two states. Reads the current value, flips it (open↔closed, on↔off, etc.), and saves the new state. Returns both the previous and new value. Perfect for status pages, open/closed badges, or any on/off switch.
description.de: Schaltet ein einfaches Feld zwischen zwei Zuständen um. Liest den aktuellen Wert, kippt ihn (offen↔geschlossen, an↔aus, etc.) und speichert den neuen Zustand. Gibt sowohl den vorherigen als auch den neuen Wert zurück. Ideal für Statusseiten, Geöffnet/Geschlossen-Anzeigen oder jeden Ein-/Aus-Schalter.
description.es: Alterna un campo simple entre dos estados. Lee el valor actual, lo invierte (abierto↔cerrado, encendido↔apagado, etc.) y guarda el nuevo estado. Devuelve tanto el valor anterior como el nuevo. Perfecto para páginas de estado, insignias de abierto/cerrado o cualquier interruptor de encendido/apagado.
description.fr: Bascule un champ simple entre deux états. Lit la valeur actuelle, l'inverse (ouvert↔fermé, allumé↔éteint, etc.) et enregistre le nouvel état. Retourne à la fois la valeur précédente et la nouvelle. Idéal pour les pages de statut, les badges ouvert/fermé ou tout interrupteur marche/arrêt.
description.ro: Comută un câmp simplu între două stări. Citește valoarea curentă, o inversează (deschis↔închis, pornit↔oprit, etc.) și salvează noua stare. Returnează atât valoarea anterioară cât și cea nouă. Perfect pentru pagini de status, insigne deschis/închis sau orice comutator pornit/oprit.
description.it: Alterna un campo semplice tra due stati. Legge il valore corrente, lo inverte (aperto↔chiuso, acceso↔spento, ecc.) e salva il nuovo stato. Restituisce sia il valore precedente che quello nuovo. Perfetto per pagine di stato, badge aperto/chiuso o qualsiasi interruttore on/off.

description.en: Export the final asset from a studio project to a permanent shareable URL.
description.de: Exportiere das fertige Asset eines Studio-Projekts zu einer dauerhaften, teilbaren URL.

description.de: Erstelle ein öffentliches oder privates JoAi-Team mit Profil, Tags, Kontaktinfos und Einstellungen. Diese Aktion eignet sich zum Onboarding von Betrieben, Organisationen und Workspaces, damit sie in verbundenen Apps, Stores, Verzeichnissen und öffentlichen Katalogen erscheinen können.

description.en: Sends an in-app push notification to all team members of the current agent.
description.de: Sendet eine In-App-Push-Benachrichtigung an alle Teammitglieder des aktuellen Agenten.

description.en: Post a deal, event, or news-style update for your team so it can appear in connected websites, directories, and public feeds. Supports scheduled publishing windows, links, and draft or published status for local business communication.
description.de: Veröffentliche ein Angebot, Event oder eine News für dein Team, damit sie auf verbundenen Websites, in Verzeichnissen und öffentlichen Feeds erscheinen kann. Unterstützt geplante Zeiträume, Links sowie Entwurf- oder Veröffentlichungsstatus für lokale Betriebsinfos.

description.de: Entferne ein bestehendes Angebot, Event oder eine News aus deinem Team. Nutze diese Aktion, wenn veraltete Ankündigungen nicht mehr auf verbundenen Websites, in Verzeichnissen oder öffentlichen Feeds erscheinen sollen.

description.de: Zeige aktuelle oder archivierte Angebote, Events und News für dein Team. Filtere nach Typ, Status oder aktivem Veröffentlichungszeitraum, um zu prüfen, was Kunden auf verbundenen Websites und öffentlichen Feeds sehen.

description.en: View summary counts for your team updates, including deals, events, and news-style posts. Use this to understand how much active customer-facing content is available across connected websites and public feeds.
description.de: Zeige zusammengefasste Zahlen für Team-Updates, inklusive Angeboten, Events und News. So siehst du, wie viele kundenrelevante Inhalte auf verbundenen Websites und öffentlichen Feeds verfügbar sind.

description.en: Edit an existing deal, event, or news-style update for your team. Change the title, body, type, schedule, link, or publication status so connected websites and public feeds stay accurate.
description.de: Bearbeite ein bestehendes Angebot, Event oder eine News für dein Team. Ändere Titel, Text, Typ, Zeitraum, Link oder Veröffentlichungsstatus, damit verbundene Websites und öffentliche Feeds aktuell bleiben.

title.ro: Intra in programul nostru de loialitate!

description.en: Register your loyalty card and start earning stamps towards free rewards.
description.de: Registriere deine Treuekarte und sammle Stempel für kostenlose Belohnungen.
description.fr: Enregistrez votre carte de fidelite et commencez a cumuler des tampons pour obtenir des recompenses.
description.es: Registra tu tarjeta de fidelizacion y empieza a acumular sellos para conseguir recompensas.
description.ro: Inregistreaza-ti cardul de loialitate si incepe sa aduni stampile pentru recompense.
description.it: Register your loyalty card and start earning stamps towards free rewards.

description.en: Check for customers who haven't visited recently and send them a reminder.
description.de: Prüfe auf Kunden, die kürzlich nicht da waren, und sende eine Erinnerung.
description.fr: Reperez les clients qui ne sont pas revenus depuis un moment et envoyez-leur un rappel.
description.es: Busca clientes que no hayan venido ultimamente y enviales un recordatorio.
description.ro: Verifica clientii care nu au mai venit de ceva timp si trimite-le un memento.
description.it: Check for customers who haven't visited recently and send them a reminder.

description.en: Rate us on Google and get a discount on your next visit.
description.de: Bewerte uns auf Google und erhalte einen Rabatt auf deinen nächsten Besuch.
description.fr: Laissez-nous un avis sur Google et profitez d une reduction lors de votre prochaine visite.
description.es: Valoranos en Google y consigue un descuento en tu proxima visita.
description.ro: Lasa-ne un review pe Google si primesti o reducere la urmatoarea vizita.
description.it: Rate us on Google and get a discount on your next visit.

title.fr: Programmer les cartes NFC de fidelite

description.en: Program NFC cards for your loyalty program. All cards get the same agent URL — the NFC chip's hardware ID is the unique card identity.
description.de: Programmiere NFC-Karten für dein Treueprogramm. Alle Karten bekommen dieselbe Agent-URL — die Hardware-ID des NFC-Chips ist die eindeutige Kartenidentität.
description.fr: Programmez les cartes NFC de votre programme de fidelite. Toutes les cartes utilisent la meme URL d agent : l identifiant materiel de la puce NFC sert d identite unique.
description.es: Programa las tarjetas NFC para tu programa de fidelizacion. Todas usan la misma URL del agente: el identificador fisico del chip NFC es la identidad unica de cada tarjeta.
description.ro: Programeaza cardurile NFC pentru programul tau de loialitate. Toate cardurile folosesc acelasi URL al agentului, iar ID-ul hardware al cipului NFC este identitatea unica a cardului.
description.it: Program NFC cards for your loyalty program. All cards get the same agent URL — the NFC chip's hardware ID is the unique card identity.

description.en: Scan a customer's loyalty card to add a stamp and track their reward progress. Automatically shows the current stamp count and notifies when a reward is ready to be redeemed.
description.de: Scanne die Treuekarte eines Kunden, um einen Stempel hinzuzufügen und den Prämienfortschritt zu verfolgen. Zeigt automatisch den aktuellen Stempelstand an und informiert, wenn eine Prämie eingelöst werden kann.
description.fr: Scannez la carte de fidelite d un client pour ajouter un tampon et suivre sa progression. Le nombre de tampons est affiche automatiquement et une notification apparait lorsqu une recompense peut etre utilisee.
description.es: Escanea la tarjeta de fidelizacion de un cliente para anadir un sello y seguir su progreso. Se muestra automaticamente el numero actual de sellos y se avisa cuando ya puede canjear una recompensa.
description.ro: Scaneaza cardul de loialitate al clientului pentru a adauga o stampila si a urmari progresul. Numarul de stampile este afisat automat, iar sistemul anunta cand recompensa poate fi folosita.
description.it: Scan a customer's loyalty card to add a stamp and track their reward progress. Automatically shows the current stamp count and notifies when a reward is ready to be redeemed.

description.en: Check your stamp progress and available rewards.
description.de: Überprüfe deinen Stempelfortschritt und verfügbare Belohnungen.
description.fr: Consultez votre progression et les recompenses disponibles.
description.es: Consulta tu progreso de sellos y las recompensas disponibles.
description.ro: Verifica progresul stampilelor si recompensele disponibile.
description.it: Check your stamp progress and available rewards.

description.en: Manage email lists, campaigns, subscribers, and transactional emails with Mailcoach's powerful REST API. Automate your email marketing workflows.
description.de: Verwalte E-Mail-Listen, Kampagnen, Abonnenten und transaktionale E-Mails mit Mailcoachs leistungsstarker REST API. Automatisiere deine E-Mail-Marketing-Workflows.

install.summary: Connect Mailcoach to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
examplePrompts: List the Mailcoach tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication Mailcoach needs before I run an action.
Use Mailcoach to help me with the task I describe next.
usageNotes: Every listed action becomes an MCP tool when the app server is connected.
Prefer the generated provider plugin when one is available, and fall back to the raw MCP URL otherwise.
authPrerequisites: Some actions require provider credentials or OAuth on first use.

reviewerNotes: This app wraps Mailcoach's public warp actions behind JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
The generated submission bundle is ready for runtime validation even when marketplace screenshots have not been attached yet.
testPrompts: List the Mailcoach tools available in this app.
What authentication does Mailcoach require before you can use it?
Use the best Mailcoach tool for the task I describe next.
review.demoFlow: Connect the hosted MCP URL, authenticate if prompted, then call one of the listed app actions.
review.credentialsReference: Use the same provider credentials or OAuth flow that the underlying warp actions already require.

claude.title: Claude Plugin
claude.description: Add the official JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this app plugin by name.

primaryAction.label: Copy marketplace command
primaryAction.value: claude plugin marketplace add --scope user JoAiHQ/claude-plugins

notes: Add the JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this plugin by name.

codex.title: Codex Plugin
codex.description: Install this app from the official JoAi Codex marketplace, or use the MCP URL if your Codex build still relies on direct MCP setup.
notes: Add the JoAi Codex marketplace in Codex first, then install this plugin by name.

cursor.title: Cursor Plugin
cursor.description: Install this app in Cursor with one click, or fall back to the hosted MCP URL manually.
notes: The one-click install opens Cursor directly with this app prefilled.

openai.title: ChatGPT App
openai.description: Use this app in ChatGPT today by connecting the hosted MCP URL.
notes: Paste the hosted MCP URL into ChatGPT to connect the app today.

install.summary: Connect Medium to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
examplePrompts: List the Medium tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication Medium needs before I run an action.
Use Medium to help me with the task I describe next.
usageNotes: Every listed action becomes an MCP tool when the app server is connected.
Prefer the generated provider plugin when one is available, and fall back to the raw MCP URL otherwise.
authPrerequisites: Some actions require provider credentials or OAuth on first use.

reviewerNotes: This app wraps Medium's public warp actions behind JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
The generated submission bundle is ready for runtime validation even when marketplace screenshots have not been attached yet.
testPrompts: List the Medium tools available in this app.
What authentication does Medium require before you can use it?
Use the best Medium tool for the task I describe next.
review.demoFlow: Connect the hosted MCP URL, authenticate if prompted, then call one of the listed app actions.
review.credentialsReference: Use the same provider credentials or OAuth flow that the underlying warp actions already require.
