title.es: Ver datos de guardian de cuenta MultiversX
title.fr: Voir les données guardian du compte MultiversX
title.ro: Vezi datele de guardian ale contului MultiversX
title.it: Visualizza i dati guardian dell'account MultiversX

description.en: View guardian (2FA) information for a MultiversX blockchain account. Check if an account is protected by guardian security, view active guardian addresses, pending guardian activations, activation epochs, and service UIDs. Essential for security verification and account protection status.
description.de: Zeige Guardian-Informationen (2FA) für ein MultiversX Blockchain-Konto. Prüfe, ob ein Konto durch Guardian-Sicherheit geschützt ist, sieh aktive Guardian-Adressen, ausstehende Guardian-Aktivierungen, Aktivierungs-Epochen und Service-UIDs. Wichtig zur Sicherheitsverifikation und Überprüfung des Kontoschutzes.
description.es: Ver información de guardian (2FA) para una cuenta MultiversX. Verifica si una cuenta está protegida por seguridad de guardian, mira direcciones de guardian activas, activaciones pendientes, épocas de activación y UIDs de servicio. Esencial para verificación de seguridad y estado de protección de cuenta.
description.fr: Voir les informations guardian (2FA) pour un compte MultiversX. Vérifie si un compte est protégé par la sécurité guardian, vois les adresses guardian actives, les activations en attente, les époques d'activation et les UID de service. Essentiel pour la vérification de sécurité et le statut de protection du compte.
description.ro: Vezi informațiile guardian (2FA) pentru un cont MultiversX. Verifică dacă un cont este protejat de securitatea guardian, vezi adresele guardian active, activările în așteptare, epocile de activare și UID-urile de serviciu. Esențial pentru verificarea securității și starea de protecție a contului.
description.it: Visualizza le informazioni guardian (2FA) per un account MultiversX. Verifica se un account è protetto dalla sicurezza guardian, visualizza gli indirizzi guardian attivi, le attivazioni in sospeso, le epoche di attivazione e gli UID del servizio. Essenziale per la verifica della sicurezza e lo stato di protezione dell'account.

description.en: View comprehensive account information for a MultiversX blockchain account. Get the account balance in eGold (EGLD), transaction nonce, username, and all account details in one place. Perfect for checking wallet status, balance verification, and account overview.
description.de: Zeige umfassende Kontoinformationen für ein MultiversX Blockchain-Konto. Erhalte den Kontostand in eGold (EGLD), Transaktions-Nonce, Benutzername und alle Kontodetails auf einen Blick. Ideal zur Überprüfung des Wallet-Status, Kontostandsverifikation und Kontovorschau.
description.es: View comprehensive account information for a MultiversX blockchain account. Get the account balance in eGold (EGLD), transaction nonce, username, and all account details in one place. Perfect for checking wallet status, balance verification, and account overview.
description.fr: View comprehensive account information for a MultiversX blockchain account. Get the account balance in eGold (EGLD), transaction nonce, username, and all account details in one place. Perfect for checking wallet status, balance verification, and account overview.
description.ro: View comprehensive account information for a MultiversX blockchain account. Get the account balance in eGold (EGLD), transaction nonce, username, and all account details in one place. Perfect for checking wallet status, balance verification, and account overview.
description.it: View comprehensive account information for a MultiversX blockchain account. Get the account balance in eGold (EGLD), transaction nonce, username, and all account details in one place. Perfect for checking wallet status, balance verification, and account overview.

title.fr: Voir les NFTs du compte MultiversX

description.en: View all NFTs owned by a MultiversX blockchain account. See your complete NFT collection including identifiers, names, collections, nonces, creators, royalties, and attributes. Browse your NFT holdings and collection details across the MultiversX network.
description.de: Zeige alle NFTs an, die von einem MultiversX Blockchain-Konto besessen werden. Sieh deine vollständige NFT-Sammlung einschließlich Identifikatoren, Namen, Sammlungen, Nonces, Erstellern, Lizenzgebühren und Attributen. Durchstöbere deine NFT-Bestände und Sammlungsdetails im MultiversX-Netzwerk.
description.es: Ver todos los NFTs de una cuenta MultiversX. Ve tu colección completa de NFTs incluyendo identificadores, nombres, colecciones, nonces, creadores, regalías y atributos. Navega tus tenencias de NFTs y detalles de colección en la red MultiversX.
description.fr: Voir tous les NFTs détenus par un compte MultiversX. Vois ta collection complète de NFTs, y compris les identifiants, noms, collections, nonces, créateurs, redevances et attributs. Parcours tes avoirs en NFTs et les détails de collection sur le réseau MultiversX.
description.ro: Vezi toate NFT-urile deținute de un cont MultiversX. Vezi colecția ta completă de NFT-uri, inclusiv identificatori, nume, colecții, nonce-uri, creatori, redevențe și atribute. Navighează prin deținerile tale de NFT-uri și detaliile colecției pe rețeaua MultiversX.
description.it: Visualizza tutti gli NFT posseduti da un account MultiversX. Vedi la tua collezione completa di NFT inclusi identificatori, nomi, collezioni, nonce, creatori, royalty e attributi. Sfoglia le tue disponibilità NFT e i dettagli della collezione sulla rete MultiversX.

title.fr: Voir les tokens du compte MultiversX

description.en: View all ESDT tokens held by a MultiversX blockchain account with their balances. See your complete token portfolio including token identifiers, balances, decimals, names, and tickers. Track all your token holdings across the MultiversX network in one view.
description.de: Zeige alle ESDT-Token an, die von einem MultiversX Blockchain-Konto gehalten werden, mit ihren Salden. Sieh dein vollständiges Token-Portfolio einschließlich Token-Identifikatoren, Salden, Dezimalstellen, Namen und Ticker. Verfolge alle deine Token-Bestände im MultiversX-Netzwerk auf einen Blick.
description.es: Ver todos los tokens ESDT de una cuenta MultiversX con sus saldos. Ve tu portafolio completo de tokens incluyendo identificadores, saldos, decimales, nombres y tickers. Rastrea todas tus tenencias de tokens en la red MultiversX en una vista.
description.fr: Voir tous les tokens ESDT détenus par un compte MultiversX avec leurs soldes. Vois ton portefeuille complet de tokens, y compris les identifiants, soldes, décimales, noms et tickers. Suis tous tes avoirs en tokens sur le réseau MultiversX en un seul aperçu.
description.ro: Vezi toate token-urile ESDT deținute de un cont MultiversX cu soldurile lor. Vezi portofoliul tău complet de token-uri, inclusiv identificatori, solduri, zecimale, nume și ticker-e. Urmărește toate deținerile tale de token-uri pe rețeaua MultiversX într-o singură vedere.
description.it: Visualizza tutti i token ESDT detenuti da un account MultiversX con i loro saldi. Vedi il tuo portafoglio completo di token inclusi identificatori, saldi, decimali, nomi e ticker. Tieni traccia di tutte le tue disponibilità di token sulla rete MultiversX in un'unica vista.

title.es: Ver conteo de transacciones de MultiversX
title.fr: Voir le nombre de transactions MultiversX
title.it: Visualizza il conteggio delle transazioni MultiversX

description.en: View the total number of transactions for a MultiversX blockchain account.
description.de: Zeige die Gesamtzahl der Transaktionen für ein MultiversX-Blockchain-Konto an.
description.es: Ver el número total de transacciones de una cuenta MultiversX.
description.fr: Voir le nombre total de transactions d'un compte MultiversX.
description.ro: Vezi numărul total de tranzacții ale unui cont MultiversX.
description.it: Visualizza il numero totale di transazioni di un account MultiversX.

title.it: Visualizza la cronologia delle transazioni MultiversX

description.en: View the complete transaction history for a MultiversX blockchain account. Retrieve recent transactions with full details including transaction hashes, status, timestamps, values, senders, and receivers. Track account activity and transaction flow over time.
description.de: Zeige den vollständigen Transaktionsverlauf für ein MultiversX Blockchain-Konto. Rufe aktuelle Transaktionen mit vollständigen Details ab, einschließlich Transaktions-Hashes, Status, Zeitstempel, Werte, Absender und Empfänger. Verfolge Kontobewegungen und Transaktionsfluss über die Zeit.
description.es: Ver el historial completo de transacciones de una cuenta MultiversX. Recupera transacciones recientes con detalles completos incluyendo hashes, estado, timestamps, valores, remitentes y destinatarios. Rastrea la actividad de la cuenta y el flujo de transacciones a lo largo del tiempo.
description.fr: Voir l'historique complet des transactions d'un compte MultiversX. Récupère les transactions récentes avec tous les détails, y compris les hashs, le statut, les horodatages, les valeurs, les expéditeurs et les destinataires. Suis l'activité du compte et le flux des transactions au fil du temps.
description.ro: Vezi istoricul complet al tranzacțiilor unui cont MultiversX. Preia tranzacții recente cu detalii complete, inclusiv hash-uri, stare, timestamp-uri, valori, expeditori și destinatari. Urmărește activitatea contului și fluxul tranzacțiilor de-a lungul timpului.
description.it: Visualizza la cronologia completa delle transazioni di un account MultiversX. Recupera le transazioni recenti con dettagli completi inclusi hash, stato, timestamp, valori, mittenti e destinatari. Tieni traccia dell'attività dell'account e del flusso delle transazioni nel tempo.

title.en: Issue a Fungible ESDT Token on MultiversX
title.es: Emitir un token ESDT fungible en MultiversX
title.fr: Émettre un token ESDT fongible sur MultiversX
title.ro: Emite un token ESDT fungibil pe MultiversX
title.it: Emettere un token ESDT fungibile su MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new fungible ESDT token on the MultiversX blockchain. Define the token name, ticker, initial supply, and decimal precision. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, the token identifier (e.g. MYTICKER-xxxxxx) will be assigned by the protocol.
description.de: Erstelle und gib einen neuen fungiblen ESDT-Token auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. Definiere Token-Name, Ticker, initiale Versorgung und Dezimalgenauigkeit. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe wird der Token-Identifier (z.B. MYTICKER-xxxxxx) vom Protokoll zugewiesen.
description.es: Crear y emitir un nuevo token ESDT fungible en la blockchain MultiversX. Define el nombre del token, ticker, suministro inicial y precisión decimal. Requiere una tarifa de emisión de 0.05 EGLD. Después de la emisión, el identificador del token (ej., MITICKER-xxxxxx) será asignado por el protocolo.
description.fr: Créer et émettre un nouveau token ESDT fongible sur la blockchain MultiversX. Définis le nom du token, le ticker, l'offre initiale et la précision décimale. Nécessite des frais d'émission de 0.05 EGLD. Après l'émission, l'identifiant du token (ex. MONTICKER-xxxxxx) sera attribué par le protocole.
description.ro: Creează și emite un nou token ESDT fungibil pe blockchain-ul MultiversX. Definește numele token-ului, ticker-ul, furnizarea inițială și precizia zecimală. Necesită o taxă de emitere de 0.05 EGLD. După emitere, identificatorul token-ului (ex. TICKERMEU-xxxxxx) va fi atribuit de protocol.
description.it: Creare ed emettere un nuovo token ESDT fungibile sulla blockchain MultiversX. Definisci il nome del token, il ticker, la fornitura iniziale e la precisione decimale. Richiede una commissione di emissione di 0.05 EGLD. Dopo l'emissione, l'identificatore del token (es. MIOTICKER-xxxxxx) sarà assegnato dal protocollo.

title.en: Issue an NFT Collection on MultiversX
title.es: Emitir una colección NFT en MultiversX
title.fr: Émettre une collection NFT sur MultiversX
title.ro: Emite o colecție NFT pe MultiversX
title.it: Emettere una collezione NFT su MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new Non-Fungible Token (NFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. Each token in the collection will be unique. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint individual NFTs.
description.de: Erstelle und gib eine neue Non-Fungible Token (NFT) Kollektion auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. Jeder Token in der Kollektion ist einzigartig. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe muss die NFTCreate-Rolle zugewiesen werden, um NFTs zu erstellen.
description.es: Crear y emitir una nueva colección NFT (Token No Fungible) en la blockchain MultiversX. Cada token en la colección será único. Requiere una tarifa de emisión de 0.05 EGLD. Después de la emisión, asigna el rol NFTCreate a tu dirección y luego mintea NFTs individuales.
description.fr: Créer et émettre une nouvelle collection NFT (Jeton Non Fongible) sur la blockchain MultiversX. Chaque token de la collection sera unique. Nécessite des frais d'émission de 0.05 EGLD. Après l'émission, attribue le rôle NFTCreate à ton adresse, puis minte des NFTs individuels.
description.ro: Creează și emite o nouă colecție NFT (Token Non-Fungibil) pe blockchain-ul MultiversX. Fiecare token din colecție va fi unic. Necesită o taxă de emitere de 0.05 EGLD. După emitere, atribuie rolul NFTCreate adresei tale, apoi mintează NFT-uri individuale.
description.it: Creare ed emettere una nuova collezione NFT (Token Non Fungibile) sulla blockchain MultiversX. Ogni token nella collezione sarà unico. Richiede una commissione di emissione di 0.05 EGLD. Dopo l'emissione, assegna il ruolo NFTCreate al tuo indirizzo, poi minta NFT individuali.

title.en: Issue an SFT Collection on MultiversX
title.es: Emitir una colección SFT en MultiversX
title.fr: Émettre une collection SFT sur MultiversX
title.ro: Emite o colecție SFT pe MultiversX
title.it: Emettere una collezione SFT su MultiversX

description.en: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.
description.de: Erstelle und gib eine neue Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) Kollektion auf der MultiversX Blockchain aus. SFTs kombinieren Eigenschaften von fungiblen und non-fungiblen Tokens. Erfordert eine Ausgabegebühr von 0,05 EGLD. Nach der Ausgabe muss die NFTCreate-Rolle zugewiesen werden.
description.es: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.
description.fr: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.
description.ro: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.
description.it: Create and issue a new Semi-Fungible Token (SFT) collection on the MultiversX blockchain. SFTs combine properties of both fungible and non-fungible tokens — multiple copies of the same token can exist with shared metadata. Requires a 0.05 EGLD issuance fee. After issuance, assign the NFTCreate role to your address, then mint SFTs.

description.en: Mint a new NFT or SFT within an existing MultiversX collection. You must own the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role for the collection to use this. Provide the collection identifier, quantity, name, royalties, optional metadata hash, attributes, and a media URI. No EGLD fee required — only gas.
description.de: Minte ein neues NFT oder SFT innerhalb einer bestehenden MultiversX-Kollektion. Du musst die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle für die Kollektion besitzen. Gib die Kollektion-ID, Menge, Name, Royalties, optionalen Metadaten-Hash, Attribute und eine Medien-URI an. Keine EGLD-Gebühr erforderlich — nur Gas.
description.es: Mintea un nuevo NFT o SFT dentro de una colección MultiversX existente. Debes poseer el rol ESDTRoleNFTCreate para la colección. Proporciona el identificador de la colección, cantidad, nombre, regalías, hash de metadatos opcional, atributos y una URI de medio. No requiere tarifa EGLD — solo gas.
description.fr: Minte un nouveau NFT ou SFT dans une collection MultiversX existante. Tu dois posséder le rôle ESDTRoleNFTCreate pour la collection. Fournis l'identifiant de la collection, la quantité, le nom, les redevances, le hash de métadonnées optionnel, les attributs et une URI de média. Pas de frais EGLD requis — seulement du gaz.
description.ro: Mintează un NFT sau SFT nou într-o colecție MultiversX existentă. Trebuie să deții rolul ESDTRoleNFTCreate pentru colecție. Furnizează identificatorul colecției, cantitatea, numele, redevențele, hash-ul de metadate opțional, atributele și o URI media. Nu necesită taxă EGLD — doar gaz.
description.it: Minta un nuovo NFT o SFT all'interno di una collezione MultiversX esistente. Devi possedere il ruolo ESDTRoleNFTCreate per la collezione. Fornisci l'identificatore della collezione, quantità, nome, royalty, hash dei metadati opzionale, attributi e un URI del media. Nessuna commissione EGLD richiesta — solo gas.

description.en: View detailed information about a specific NFT from a MultiversX collection. Shows the NFT image, name, collection, attributes, royalties, and creator.

title.en: Assign NFT Create Role on MultiversX
title.es: Asignar rol de creación NFT en MultiversX
title.fr: Attribuer le rôle de création NFT sur MultiversX
title.ro: Atribuie rolul de creare NFT pe MultiversX
title.it: Assegna ruolo di creazione NFT su MultiversX

description.en: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.
description.de: Weise die ESDTRoleNFTCreate-Rolle einer Adresse für eine NFT- oder SFT-Kollektion zu. Diese Rolle ist erforderlich, bevor NFTs geprägt werden können. Nur der Kollektion-Eigentümer kann Rollen zuweisen.
description.es: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.
description.fr: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.
description.ro: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.
description.it: Assign the ESDTRoleNFTCreate role to an address for an NFT or SFT collection. This role is required before minting NFTs. Only the collection owner (issuer) can assign roles. After assigning, the address can create/mint NFTs in the collection.

title.es: Ver economía de red de MultiversX

description.en: View MultiversX network economics and market data. Get current EGLD price, market capitalization, total supply, circulating supply, total staked amount, annual percentage rate (APR) for staking, and top-up rewards information. Track economic metrics and staking rewards across the network.
description.de: Zeige MultiversX Netzwerkökonomie und Marktdaten. Erhalte aktuellen EGLD-Preis, Marktkapitalisierung, Gesamtversorgung, zirkulierende Versorgung, insgesamt gestakten Betrag, jährliche prozentuale Rendite (APR) für Staking und Top-up-Belohnungsinformationen. Verfolge Wirtschaftskennzahlen und Staking-Belohnungen im Netzwerk.
description.es: Ver economía de red y datos de mercado de MultiversX. Obtén el precio actual de EGLD, capitalización de mercado, suministro total, suministro circulante, cantidad total apostada, tasa de porcentaje anual (APR) para staking e información de recompensas de top-up. Rastrea métricas económicas y recompensas de staking en toda la red.
description.fr: Voir l'économie du réseau et les données de marché MultiversX. Obtiens le prix actuel EGLD, la capitalisation boursière, l'offre totale, l'offre circulante, le montant total stakeé, le taux de pourcentage annuel (APR) pour le staking et les informations sur les récompenses de top-up. Suis les métriques économiques et les récompenses de staking sur le réseau.
description.ro: Vezi economia rețelei și datele de piață MultiversX. Obține prețul actual EGLD, capitalizarea de piață, furnizarea totală, furnizarea în circulație, suma totală mizată, rata procentuală anuală (APR) pentru staking și informații despre recompensele top-up. Urmărește metricile economice și recompensele de staking în rețeaua.
description.it: Visualizza l'economia di rete e i dati di mercato MultiversX. Ottieni il prezzo attuale EGLD, capitalizzazione di mercato, offerta totale, offerta circolante, importo totale in staking, tasso percentuale annuo (APR) per lo staking e informazioni sulle ricompense top-up. Tieni traccia delle metriche economiche e delle ricompense di staking sulla rete.

title.es: Ver estado de red de MultiversX
title.fr: Voir le statut du réseau MultiversX
title.it: Visualizza lo stato della rete MultiversX

description.en: View current MultiversX network status and statistics. Get real-time network information including current epoch, round number, highest final nonce, number of shards, minimum gas price, and root hash. Monitor network health and current blockchain state.
description.de: Zeige den aktuellen MultiversX Netzwerkstatus und Statistiken. Erhalte Echtzeit-Netzwerkinformationen einschließlich aktueller Epoche, Rundennummer, höchster finaler Nonce, Anzahl der Shards, minimaler Gaspreis und Root-Hash. Überwache die Netzwerkgesundheit und den aktuellen Blockchain-Status.
description.es: Ver el estado actual y estadísticas de la red MultiversX. Obtén información de red en tiempo real incluyendo época actual, número de ronda, nonce final más alto, número de shards, precio mínimo de gas y hash raíz. Monitorea la salud de la red y el estado actual de la blockchain.
description.fr: Voir le statut actuel et les statistiques du réseau MultiversX. Obtiens des informations réseau en temps réel, y compris l'époque actuelle, le numéro de round, le nonce final le plus élevé, le nombre de shards, le prix minimum du gaz et le hash racine. Surveille la santé du réseau et l'état actuel de la blockchain.
description.ro: Vezi starea actuală și statisticile rețelei MultiversX. Obține informații în timp real despre rețea, inclusiv epoca actuală, numărul rundei, nonce-ul final cel mai mare, numărul de shard-uri, prețul minim al gazului și hash-ul rădăcinii. Monitorizează sănătatea rețelei și starea actuală a blockchain-ului.
description.it: Visualizza lo stato attuale e le statistiche della rete MultiversX. Ottieni informazioni in tempo reale sulla rete, inclusi epoca corrente, numero di round, nonce finale più alto, numero di shard, prezzo minimo del gas e hash radice. Monitora la salute della rete e lo stato corrente della blockchain.

title.fr: Voir les détails de la transaction MultiversX
title.it: Visualizza i dettagli della transazione MultiversX

description.en: View detailed information about a specific MultiversX transaction by its hash. Get complete transaction data including status, sender, receiver, value in EGLD, gas information, timestamp, nonce, and execution details. Perfect for transaction verification and tracking.
description.de: Zeige detaillierte Informationen zu einer bestimmten MultiversX-Transaktion anhand ihres Hashes. Erhalte vollständige Transaktionsdaten einschließlich Status, Absender, Empfänger, Wert in EGLD, Gas-Informationen, Zeitstempel, Nonce und Ausführungsdetails. Ideal zur Transaktionsverifikation und -verfolgung.
description.es: Ver información detallada de una transacción MultiversX por su hash. Obtén datos completos incluyendo estado, remitente, destinatario, valor en EGLD, información de gas, timestamp, nonce y detalles de ejecución. Perfecto para verificación y seguimiento de transacciones.
description.fr: Voir les informations détaillées d'une transaction MultiversX spécifique par son hash. Obtiens des données de transaction complètes, y compris le statut, l'expéditeur, le destinataire, la valeur en EGLD, les informations de gaz, l'horodatage, le nonce et les détails d'exécution. Parfait pour la vérification et le suivi des transactions.
description.ro: Vezi informații detaliate despre o tranzacție MultiversX specifică după hash-ul său. Obține date complete ale tranzacției, inclusiv stare, expeditor, destinatar, valoare în EGLD, informații despre gaz, timestamp, nonce și detalii de execuție. Perfect pentru verificarea și urmărirea tranzacțiilor.
description.it: Visualizza informazioni dettagliate su una specifica transazione MultiversX tramite il suo hash. Ottieni dati completi della transazione inclusi stato, mittente, destinatario, valore in EGLD, informazioni sul gas, timestamp, nonce e dettagli di esecuzione. Perfetto per la verifica e il monitoraggio delle transazioni.

title.fr: Vérifier le statut de la transaction MultiversX

description.en: Check the execution status of a MultiversX transaction by its hash. Verify if a transaction is pending, successful, or failed. Track transaction completion and monitor transaction state on the MultiversX network.
description.de: Prüfe den Ausführungsstatus einer MultiversX-Transaktion anhand ihres Hashes. Verifiziere, ob eine Transaktion ausstehend, erfolgreich oder fehlgeschlagen ist. Verfolge den Transaktionsabschluss und überwache den Transaktionsstatus im MultiversX-Netzwerk.
description.es: Verificar el estado de ejecución de una transacción MultiversX por su hash. Verifica si una transacción está pendiente, fue exitosa o falló. Rastrea la finalización y monitorea el estado de la transacción en la red MultiversX.
description.fr: Vérifier le statut d'exécution d'une transaction MultiversX par son hash. Vérifie si une transaction est en attente, réussie ou échouée. Suis l'achèvement de la transaction et surveille son état sur le réseau MultiversX.
description.ro: Verifică starea de execuție a unei tranzacții MultiversX după hash-ul său. Verifică dacă o tranzacție este în așteptare, reușită sau eșuată. Urmărește finalizarea tranzacției și monitorizează starea acesteia pe rețeaua MultiversX.
description.it: Verifica lo stato di esecuzione di una transazione MultiversX tramite il suo hash. Verifica se una transazione è in sospeso, riuscita o fallita. Tieni traccia del completamento della transazione e monitora lo stato della transazione sulla rete MultiversX.

description.en: Create a followup run continuing from a previous OpenAI run.

description.it: Crea un'esecuzione di follow-up continuando da un'esecuzione OpenAI precedente.

description.en: Cancel a running OpenAI background task. Stop an in-progress job to save resources or correct instructions before it completes.
description.de: Brich eine laufende OpenAI-Hintergrundaufgabe ab. Stoppe einen laufenden Job, um Ressourcen zu sparen oder Anweisungen zu korrigieren, bevor er abgeschlossen wird.
description.es: Cancele una tarea en segundo plano de OpenAI en ejecución. Detenga un trabajo en progreso para ahorrar recursos o corregir instrucciones antes de que se complete.
description.fr: Annulez une tâche en arrière-plan OpenAI en cours d'exécution. Arrêtez une tâche en cours pour économiser des ressources ou corriger des instructions avant qu'elle ne soit terminée.
description.ro: Anulați o sarcină de fundal OpenAI care rulează. Opriți o lucrare în desfășurare pentru a economisi resurse sau pentru a corecta instrucțiuni înainte de finalizare.
description.it: Annulla un'attività in background OpenAI in esecuzione. Arresta un lavoro in corso per risparmiare risorse o correggere le istruzioni prima che venga completato.

description.en: Send a follow-up instruction through Codex exec mode.
description.es: Enviar una instrucción de seguimiento a través del modo ejecutivo de Codex.

description.ro: Trimiteți o instrucțiune ulterioară prin modul Codex exec.
description.it: Invia un'istruzione di follow-up tramite la modalità Codex exec.

description.en: Request cancellation through Codex exec mode.
description.es: Solicitar cancelación a través del modo ejecutivo de Codex.
description.fr: Demander l'annulation via le mode exécutable du Codex.
description.ro: Solicitați anularea prin modul Codex exec.
description.it: Richiedi la cancellazione tramite la modalità Codex exec.

title.fr: Obtenir le statut de la tâche (Codex)

description.es: Verifique el estado de la tarea solicitando al Codex una actualización de estado de una línea.
description.fr: Vérifiez l’état de la tâche en demandant au Codex une mise à jour de l’état sur une ligne.
description.ro: Verificați starea sarcinii solicitând Codex o actualizare de stare pe o singură linie.
description.it: Controlla lo stato dell'attività chiedendo al Codex un aggiornamento dello stato su una riga.

description.en: Launch a task through Codex CLI non-interactive exec mode.
description.es: Inicie una tarea a través del modo ejecutivo no interactivo de Codex CLI.
description.fr: Lancez une tâche via le mode d’exécution non interactif de Codex CLI.
description.ro: Lansați o sarcină prin modul exec non-interactiv Codex CLI.
description.it: Avvia un'attività tramite la modalità exec non interattiva della CLI del Codex.

title.es: Obtener el estado de la tarea
title.fr: Obtenir le statut de la tâche

description.en: Check the progress of an OpenAI background task. See whether your job is queued, processing, or completed, and review the results when ready.
description.de: Prüfe den Fortschritt einer OpenAI-Hintergrundaufgabe. Sieh nach, ob dein Job in der Warteschlange steht, verarbeitet wird oder abgeschlossen ist, und rufe die Ergebnisse ab.
description.es: Verifique el progreso de una tarea en segundo plano de OpenAI. Vea si su trabajo está en cola, procesándose o completado, y revise los resultados cuando esté listo.
description.fr: Vérifiez la progression d'une tâche en arrière-plan OpenAI. Vérifiez si votre tâche est en file d'attente, en cours de traitement ou terminée, et examinez les résultats lorsqu'ils sont prêts.
description.ro: Verificați progresul unei sarcini de fundal OpenAI. Vedeți dacă lucrarea dvs. este pusă în coadă, procesată sau finalizată și examinați rezultatele când sunteți gata.
description.it: Controlla lo stato di avanzamento di un'attività in background di OpenAI. Scopri se il tuo lavoro è in coda, in elaborazione o completato e rivedi i risultati quando sono pronti.

description.it: Connetti un'app JoAi a ChatGPT incollando l'URL MCP ospitato.

title.es: Instale el complemento JoAi para Codex
title.fr: Installer le plugin JoAi pour le Codex
title.it: Installa il plugin JoAi per Codex

description.en: Add the official JoAi Codex marketplace, then install any JoAi app plugin by name.
description.de: Füge den offiziellen JoAi-Codex-Marktplatz hinzu und installiere danach jedes JoAi-App-Plugin per Namen.
description.es: Agregue el mercado oficial de JoAi Codex, luego instale cualquier complemento de la aplicación JoAi por su nombre.
description.fr: Ajoutez le marché officiel JoAi Codex, puis installez n'importe quel plugin d'application JoAi par son nom.
description.ro: Adăugați piața oficială JoAi Codex, apoi instalați orice plugin pentru aplicația JoAi după nume.
description.it: Aggiungi il marketplace ufficiale JoAi Codex, quindi installa qualsiasi plug-in dell'app JoAi in base al nome.

description.en: Launch a new background task powered by OpenAI. Send instructions to be processed asynchronously, ideal for long-running AI jobs like content generation, data analysis, or batch processing.
description.de: Starte eine neue Hintergrundaufgabe mit OpenAI. Sende Anweisungen zur asynchronen Verarbeitung, ideal für langwierige KI-Aufgaben wie Content-Erstellung, Datenanalyse oder Batch-Verarbeitung.
description.es: Inicie una nueva tarea en segundo plano impulsada por OpenAI. Envíe instrucciones para procesarlas de forma asincrónica, ideal para trabajos de IA de larga duración, como generación de contenido, análisis de datos o procesamiento por lotes.
description.fr: Lancez une nouvelle tâche en arrière-plan optimisée par OpenAI. Envoyez des instructions à traiter de manière asynchrone, ce qui est idéal pour les tâches d'IA de longue durée telles que la génération de contenu, l'analyse de données ou le traitement par lots.
description.ro: Lansați o nouă sarcină de fundal alimentată de OpenAI. Trimiteți instrucțiuni pentru a fi procesate asincron, ideal pentru lucrări AI de lungă durată, cum ar fi generarea de conținut, analiza datelor sau procesarea în loturi.
description.it: Avvia una nuova attività in background basata su OpenAI. Invia istruzioni da elaborare in modo asincrono, ideale per lavori di intelligenza artificiale di lunga durata come la generazione di contenuti, l'analisi dei dati o l'elaborazione batch.

description.en: Draft a personalized outreach message for a contact. Fetches the contact's profile and recent activity history, then uses AI to write a context-aware message tailored to the chosen occasion. Returns the draft for human review — does not send.
description.de: Entwirf eine personalisierte Outreach-Nachricht für einen Kontakt. Lädt das Profil und die letzten Aktivitäten des Kontakts und schreibt mit KI eine kontextbezogene Nachricht zum gewählten Anlass. Gibt den Entwurf zur Freigabe zurück — sendet nicht.
description.es: Draft a personalized outreach message for a contact. Fetches the contact's profile and recent activity history, then uses AI to write a context-aware message tailored to the chosen occasion. Returns the draft for human review — does not send.
description.fr: Draft a personalized outreach message for a contact. Fetches the contact's profile and recent activity history, then uses AI to write a context-aware message tailored to the chosen occasion. Returns the draft for human review — does not send.
description.ro: Draft a personalized outreach message for a contact. Fetches the contact's profile and recent activity history, then uses AI to write a context-aware message tailored to the chosen occasion. Returns the draft for human review — does not send.
description.it: Draft a personalized outreach message for a contact. Fetches the contact's profile and recent activity history, then uses AI to write a context-aware message tailored to the chosen occasion. Returns the draft for human review — does not send.

description.en: Compose and send a message to all contacts in a segment or tag.
description.de: Eine Nachricht an alle Kontakte in einem Segment oder Tag verfassen und senden.
description.es: Compose and send a message to all contacts in a segment or tag.
description.fr: Compose and send a message to all contacts in a segment or tag.
description.ro: Compose and send a message to all contacts in a segment or tag.
description.it: Compose and send a message to all contacts in a segment or tag.

description.en: Send a personalized outreach message to a specific CRM contact.
description.de: Eine personalisierte Outreach-Nachricht an einen bestimmten CRM-Kontakt senden.
description.es: Send a personalized outreach message to a specific CRM contact.
description.fr: Send a personalized outreach message to a specific CRM contact.
description.ro: Send a personalized outreach message to a specific CRM contact.
description.it: Send a personalized outreach message to a specific CRM contact.

description.en: View and manage your outreach pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, parked contacts, and reply status in one overview.
description.de: Deine Outreach-Pipeline einsehen und verwalten. Angemeldete Kontakte, aktueller Sequenz-Schritt, geparkte Kontakte und Antwortstatus auf einen Blick.
description.es: View and manage your outreach pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, parked contacts, and reply status in one overview.
description.fr: View and manage your outreach pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, parked contacts, and reply status in one overview.
description.ro: View and manage your outreach pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, parked contacts, and reply status in one overview.
description.it: View and manage your outreach pipeline. See enrolled contacts, their current sequence step, parked contacts, and reply status in one overview.

description.en: Enroll a CRM contact into an outreach sequence by setting the sequence name and resetting their step to 1. The host system schedules execution of the first template.
description.de: Einen CRM-Kontakt in eine Outreach-Sequenz aufnehmen, indem der Sequenz-Name gesetzt und der Schritt auf 1 zurückgesetzt wird. Das Host-System plant die Ausführung des ersten Templates.
description.es: Enroll a CRM contact into an outreach sequence by setting the sequence name and resetting their step to 1. The host system schedules execution of the first template.
description.fr: Enroll a CRM contact into an outreach sequence by setting the sequence name and resetting their step to 1. The host system schedules execution of the first template.
description.ro: Enroll a CRM contact into an outreach sequence by setting the sequence name and resetting their step to 1. The host system schedules execution of the first template.
description.it: Enroll a CRM contact into an outreach sequence by setting the sequence name and resetting their step to 1. The host system schedules execution of the first template.

description.en: Execute one step of an outreach sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.
description.de: Einen Schritt einer Outreach-Sequenz für einen Kontakt ausführen: Kontakt und passendes Template laden, Nachricht personalisieren, je nach Kanal senden oder protokollieren, dann den Kontakt zum nächsten Schritt weiterschalten.
description.es: Execute one step of an outreach sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.
description.fr: Execute one step of an outreach sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.
description.ro: Execute one step of an outreach sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.
description.it: Execute one step of an outreach sequence for a contact: fetch the contact and matching template, personalize the message, send or log it depending on channel, then advance the contact to the next step.

description.en: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.de: Erfassen, dass ein Kontakt auf eine Outreach-Nachricht geantwortet hat. Markiert den Kontakt als 'outreach-replied', damit die Sequenz gestoppt und die Antwort manuell oder durch den Agenten behandelt werden kann.
description.es: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.fr: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.ro: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.
description.it: Record that a contact replied to an outreach message. Tags the contact as 'outreach-replied' so the sequence can be stopped and the response handled manually or by the agent.

description.en: Record a single outreach interaction (WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn, post, call) on a CRM contact with structured meta so A/B tests and funnel analytics stay trackable.
description.de: Eine Outreach-Interaktion (WhatsApp, E-Mail, LinkedIn, Post, Anruf) bei einem CRM-Kontakt mit strukturiertem Meta protokollieren — A/B-Tests und Funnel-Analytics bleiben auswertbar.
description.es: Record a single outreach interaction (WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn, post, call) on a CRM contact with structured meta so A/B tests and funnel analytics stay trackable.
description.fr: Record a single outreach interaction (WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn, post, call) on a CRM contact with structured meta so A/B tests and funnel analytics stay trackable.
description.ro: Record a single outreach interaction (WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn, post, call) on a CRM contact with structured meta so A/B tests and funnel analytics stay trackable.
description.it: Record a single outreach interaction (WhatsApp, email, LinkedIn, post, call) on a CRM contact with structured meta so A/B tests and funnel analytics stay trackable.

description.en: Mark an outreach contact as parked, pausing their sequence. Useful when a contact needs a break from automated touches or when manual follow-up is needed.
description.de: Einen Outreach-Kontakt als geparkt markieren und die Sequenz pausieren. Nützlich, wenn ein Kontakt eine Pause von automatisierten Nachrichten braucht oder manuelles Follow-up erforderlich ist.

install.summary: Connect Poll to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
examplePrompts: List the Poll tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication Poll needs before I run an action.
Use Poll to help me with the task I describe next.
usageNotes: Every listed action becomes an MCP tool when the app server is connected.
Prefer the generated provider plugin when one is available, and fall back to the raw MCP URL otherwise.
authPrerequisites: Some actions require provider credentials or OAuth on first use.

reviewerNotes: This app wraps Poll's public warp actions behind JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
The generated submission bundle is ready for runtime validation even when marketplace screenshots have not been attached yet.
testPrompts: List the Poll tools available in this app.
What authentication does Poll require before you can use it?
Use the best Poll tool for the task I describe next.
review.demoFlow: Connect the hosted MCP URL, authenticate if prompted, then call one of the listed app actions.
review.credentialsReference: Use the same provider credentials or OAuth flow that the underlying warp actions already require.

claude.title: Claude Plugin
claude.description: Add the official JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this app plugin by name.

primaryAction.label: Copy marketplace command
primaryAction.value: claude plugin marketplace add --scope user JoAiHQ/claude-plugins

notes: Add the JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this plugin by name.

codex.title: Codex Plugin
codex.description: Install this app from the official JoAi Codex marketplace, or use the MCP URL if your Codex build still relies on direct MCP setup.
notes: Add the JoAi Codex marketplace in Codex first, then install this plugin by name.

cursor.title: Cursor Plugin
cursor.description: Install this app in Cursor with one click, or fall back to the hosted MCP URL manually.
notes: The one-click install opens Cursor directly with this app prefilled.

openai.title: ChatGPT App
openai.description: Use this app in ChatGPT today by connecting the hosted MCP URL.
notes: Paste the hosted MCP URL into ChatGPT to connect the app today.

description.en: Hand over group admin rights to another member.
description.de: Admin-Rechte der Gruppe an ein anderes Mitglied übertragen.
description.fr: Transferez les droits d administration du groupe a un autre membre.
description.es: Traspasa los permisos de administracion del grupo a otra persona miembro.
description.ro: Transfera drepturile de administrator ale grupului unui alt membru.
description.it: Hand over group admin rights to another member.

description.en: Add a new question to an existing group for members to vote on. Requires a group to already exist. Provide a question, optional deadline, and 2–7 answer options.
description.de: Neue Frage zu einer bestehenden Gruppe hinzufuegen, ueber die Mitglieder abstimmen koennen. Gruppe muss bereits existieren.
description.fr: Ajoutez une nouvelle question a un groupe existant pour que les membres puissent voter. Necessite qu un groupe existe deja.
description.es: Anade una nueva pregunta a un grupo existente para que los miembros voten. Requiere que el grupo ya exista.
description.ro: Adauga o noua intrebare unui grup existent pentru ca membrii sa voteze. Necesita ca grupul sa existe deja.
description.it: Add a new question to an existing group for members to vote on. Requires a group to already exist. Provide a question, optional deadline, and 2–7 answer options.

description.en: Query details of a specific poll.
description.de: Details einer bestimmten Abstimmung abfragen.
description.fr: Consultez les details d un sondage precis.
description.es: Consulta los detalles de una encuesta concreta.
description.ro: Consulta detaliile unui anumit sondaj.
description.it: Query details of a specific poll.

description.en: Query details about a voting group.
description.de: Details einer Abstimmungsgruppe abfragen.
description.fr: Consultez les details d un groupe de vote.
description.es: Consulta los detalles de un grupo de votacion.
description.ro: Consulta detaliile unui grup de vot.
description.it: Query details about a voting group.

description.en: Set up a new on-chain voting community — a DAO, HOA, team, or any group. Required first step before any polls can be created or voted on. You become admin.
description.de: Neue On-Chain-Abstimmungsgemeinschaft einrichten — eine DAO, HOA, ein Team oder jede andere Gruppe. Pflichtschritt bevor Abstimmungen erstellt werden koennen.
description.fr: Creez une communaute de vote on-chain — DAO, copropriete, equipe ou autre. Etape obligatoire avant de pouvoir creer des sondages ou voter.
description.es: Crea una comunidad de votacion on-chain: DAO, comunidad de vecinos, equipo u otro. Paso obligatorio antes de crear encuestas o votar.
description.ro: Configureaza o comunitate de vot on-chain — DAO, asociatie, echipa sau orice grup. Pas obligatoriu inainte de a crea sondaje sau de a vota.
description.it: Set up a new on-chain voting community — a DAO, HOA, team, or any group. Required first step before any polls can be created or voted on. You become admin.

description.en: Query all poll IDs belonging to a group (active and expired).
description.de: Alle Abstimmungs-IDs einer Gruppe abfragen (aktive und abgelaufene).
description.fr: Recuperez tous les identifiants de sondage d un groupe, qu ils soient actifs ou clos.
description.es: Consulta todos los IDs de encuestas de un grupo, activas o ya cerradas.
description.ro: Interogheaza toate ID-urile sondajelor dintr-un grup, active sau expirate.
description.it: Query all poll IDs belonging to a group (active and expired).

description.en: View your voting group and manage membership.
description.de: Abstimmungsgruppe anzeigen und Mitgliedschaft verwalten.
description.fr: Consultez votre groupe de vote et gerez les membres.
description.es: Consulta tu grupo de votacion y gestiona la membresia.
description.ro: Vizualizeaza grupul tau de vot si gestioneaza calitatea de membru.
description.it: View your voting group and manage membership.

description.en: Check if an invite code is still valid and how many uses remain.
description.de: Prüfen, ob ein Einladungscode noch gültig ist und wie viele Nutzungen verbleiben.
description.fr: Verifiez si un code d invitation est encore valable et combien d utilisations il reste.
description.es: Comprueba si un codigo de invitacion sigue siendo valido y cuantas veces mas puede usarse.
description.ro: Verifica daca un cod de invitatie mai este valid si cate utilizari au ramas.
description.it: Check if an invite code is still valid and how many uses remain.

description.en: Generate an invite code that lets people join your space directly without approval.
description.de: Einladungscode generieren, mit dem Personen ohne Genehmigung beitreten können.
description.fr: Generez un code d invitation qui permet de rejoindre votre espace sans approbation.
description.es: Genera un codigo de invitacion para que otras personas puedan unirse sin aprobacion previa.
description.ro: Genereaza un cod de invitatie care permite intrarea directa in spatiu fara aprobare.
description.it: Generate an invite code that lets people join your space directly without approval.

title.fr: Rejoindre avec un code d invitation

description.en: Use an invite code to join a group instantly without waiting for approval.
description.de: Mit einem Einladungscode sofort einer Gruppe beitreten, ohne auf Genehmigung zu warten.
description.fr: Utilisez un code d invitation pour rejoindre un groupe sans attendre de validation.
description.es: Usa un codigo de invitacion para unirte al grupo al instante, sin esperar aprobacion.
description.ro: Foloseste un cod de invitatie pentru a intra imediat intr-un grup, fara sa astepti aprobare.
description.it: Use an invite code to join a group instantly without waiting for approval.

description.en: Revoke an active invite code so it can no longer be used.
description.de: Aktiven Einladungscode widerrufen, sodass er nicht mehr verwendet werden kann.
description.fr: Revoquez un code d invitation actif afin qu il ne puisse plus etre utilise.
description.es: Revoca un codigo de invitacion activo para que ya no pueda usarse.
description.ro: Revoca un cod de invitatie activ astfel incat sa nu mai poata fi folosit.
description.it: Revoke an active invite code so it can no longer be used.

description.en: Approve a pending membership request and add the person to the group.
description.de: Ausstehende Mitgliedschaftsanfrage genehmigen und Person zur Gruppe hinzufügen.
description.fr: Approuvez une demande d adhesion en attente et ajoutez la personne au groupe.
description.es: Aprueba una solicitud pendiente y anade a esa persona al grupo.
description.ro: Aproba o cerere de aderare aflata in asteptare si adauga persoana in grup.
description.it: Approve a pending membership request and add the person to the group.

description.en: Check if an address is a member of a group.
description.de: Prüfen, ob eine Adresse Mitglied einer Gruppe ist.
description.fr: Verifiez si une adresse appartient a un groupe.
description.es: Comprueba si una direccion pertenece a un grupo.
description.ro: Verifica daca o adresa este membra a grupului.
description.it: Check if an address is a member of a group.

description.en: Remove a member from the group. Admin cannot remove themselves.
description.de: Mitglied aus der Gruppe entfernen. Admin kann sich nicht selbst entfernen.
description.fr: Retirez un membre du groupe. L administrateur ne peut pas se retirer lui-meme.
description.es: Elimina a una persona miembro del grupo. La persona administradora no puede eliminarse a si misma.
description.ro: Elimina un membru din grup. Administratorul nu se poate elimina singur.
description.it: Remove a member from the group. Admin cannot remove themselves.

description.en: Query which option an address voted for on a poll.
description.de: Abfragen, für welche Option eine Adresse bei einer Abstimmung gestimmt hat.
description.fr: Consultez pour quelle option une adresse a vote dans un sondage.
description.es: Consulta por que opcion voto una direccion en una encuesta.
description.ro: Afla pentru ce optiune a votat o adresa intr-un sondaj.
description.it: Query which option an address voted for on a poll.

description.en: List all members of a group.
description.de: Alle Mitglieder einer Gruppe anzeigen.
description.fr: Afficher tous les membres d un groupe.
description.es: Muestra todos los miembros de un grupo.
description.ro: Afiseaza toti membrii unui grup.
description.it: List all members of a group.

description.en: Request membership to participate in polls. The admin will approve your request.
description.de: Mitgliedschaft beantragen, um an Abstimmungen teilzunehmen. Der Admin genehmigt deine Anfrage.
description.fr: Demandez a rejoindre cet espace pour participer aux sondages. Un administrateur examinera votre demande.
description.es: Solicita unirte para participar en las encuestas. La persona administradora aprobara tu solicitud.
description.ro: Solicita aderarea pentru a putea participa la sondaje. Administratorul iti va aproba cererea.
description.it: Request membership to participate in polls. The admin will approve your request.

description.en: See all open polls in this space.
description.de: Alle offenen Abstimmungen in diesem Space anzeigen.
description.fr: Consultez tous les sondages ouverts dans cet espace.
description.es: Consulta todas las encuestas abiertas de este espacio.
description.ro: Vezi toate sondajele deschise din acest spatiu.
description.it: See all open polls in this space.

description.en: See all open polls in this space.
description.de: Alle offenen Abstimmungen in diesem Space anzeigen.
description.fr: Consultez tous les sondages ouverts dans cet espace.
description.es: Consulta todas las encuestas abiertas de este espacio.
description.ro: Vezi toate sondajele deschise din acest spatiu.
description.it: See all open polls in this space.

description.en: Deny a pending membership request.
description.de: Ausstehende Mitgliedschaftsanfrage ablehnen.
description.fr: Refusez une demande d adhesion en attente.
description.es: Rechaza una solicitud de acceso pendiente.
description.ro: Respinge o cerere de aderare aflata in asteptare.
description.it: Deny a pending membership request.

description.en: View all pending membership requests for your space.
description.de: Alle offenen Mitgliedschaftsanfragen im Space anzeigen.
description.fr: Consultez toutes les demandes d adhesion en attente pour votre espace.
description.es: Consulta todas las solicitudes de membresia pendientes de tu espacio.
description.ro: Vezi toate cererile de aderare aflate in asteptare pentru spatiul tau.
description.it: View all pending membership requests for your space.

description.en: View the current vote counts for each option.
description.de: Die aktuellen Stimmen pro Option anzeigen.
description.fr: Consultez le nombre actuel de voix pour chaque option.
description.es: Consulta el numero actual de votos de cada opcion.
description.ro: Vezi numarul curent de voturi pentru fiecare optiune.
description.it: View the current vote counts for each option.

description.en: View the live vote counts and percentages for a poll.
description.de: Aktuelle Stimmenverteilung und Prozentsätze einer Abstimmung anzeigen.
description.fr: Consultez les votes et pourcentages en temps reel pour un sondage.
description.es: Consulta los votos y porcentajes en tiempo real de una encuesta.
description.ro: Vizualizeaza voturile si procentele live ale unui sondaj.
description.it: View the live vote counts and percentages for a poll.

description.en: View a poll and cast your vote. See live results after voting.
description.de: Abstimmung anzeigen und teilnehmen. Ergebnisse nach der Abstimmung sehen.
description.fr: Consultez un sondage et votez. Voyez les resultats en direct apres avoir vote.
description.es: Ver una encuesta y votar. Ver resultados en tiempo real despues de votar.
description.ro: Vizualizeaza un sondaj si voteaza. Vezi rezultatele dupa vot.
description.it: View a poll and cast your vote. See live results after voting.

description.en: Check if an address has already voted on a poll.
description.de: Prüfen, ob eine Adresse bereits an einer Abstimmung teilgenommen hat.
description.fr: Verifiez si une adresse a deja vote dans un sondage.
description.es: Comprueba si una direccion ya ha votado en una encuesta.
description.ro: Verifica daca o adresa a votat deja intr-un sondaj.
description.it: Check if an address has already voted on a poll.

description.en: Vote on an open poll. You need to be a member of the space to vote.
description.de: An einer offenen Abstimmung teilnehmen. Du musst Mitglied des Spaces sein.
description.fr: Votez dans un sondage ouvert. Vous devez etre membre de l espace pour voter.
description.es: Vota en una encuesta abierta. Tienes que ser miembro del espacio para poder votar.
description.ro: Voteaza intr-un sondaj deschis. Trebuie sa fii membru al spatiului pentru a putea vota.
description.it: Vote on an open poll. You need to be a member of the space to vote.

description.en: Cancel a pending signature request you created. This is recorded permanently on-chain.
description.de: Eine ausstehende Signaturanfrage stornieren. Die Stornierung wird dauerhaft on-chain verzeichnet.
description.fr: Annulez une demande de signature en attente que vous avez creee. L annulation est enregistree de facon permanente on-chain.
description.es: Cancela una solicitud de firma pendiente que creaste. La cancelacion queda registrada de forma permanente on-chain.
description.ro: Anuleaza o cerere de semnatura in asteptare pe care ai creat-o. Anularea este inregistrata permanent on-chain.
description.it: Cancel a pending signature request you created. This is recorded permanently on-chain.

description.en: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.
description.de: Sende eine rechtsverbindliche Signaturanfrage. Der Unterzeichner erhält eine E-Mail und bestätigt das Dokument mit einem Klick.
description.fr: Envoyez une demande de signature juridiquement engageante. Le signataire recoit un e-mail et confirme le document en un clic.
description.es: Envia una solicitud de firma con validez legal. La persona firmante recibe un correo y confirma el documento con un clic.
description.ro: Trimite o cerere de semnatura cu valoare legala. Semnatarul primeste un e-mail si confirma documentul cu un singur clic.
description.it: Send a legally-binding signature request. The signer receives an email and confirms the document with one click.

description.en: Formally decline a signature request. This records your refusal on-chain.
description.de: Eine Signaturanfrage formal ablehnen. Die Ablehnung wird on-chain verzeichnet.
description.fr: Refuser formellement une demande de signature. Le refus est enregistre on-chain.
description.es: Rechaza formalmente una solicitud de firma. El rechazo queda registrado on-chain.
description.ro: Respinge formal o cerere de semnatura. Refuzul este inregistrat on-chain.
description.it: Formally decline a signature request. This records your refusal on-chain.

description.en: View all signature requests you have created.
description.de: Alle von dir erstellten Signaturanfragen ansehen.
description.fr: Consultez toutes les demandes de signature que vous avez creees.
description.es: Consulta todas las solicitudes de firma que has creado.
description.ro: Vezi toate cererile de semnatura pe care le-ai creat.
description.it: View all signature requests you have created.

description.en: Resend the signing link to a signer who hasn't responded yet.
description.de: Signing-Link erneut an einen Unterzeichner senden, der noch nicht reagiert hat.
description.fr: Renvoyer le lien de signature a un signataire qui n a pas encore repondu.
description.es: Reenviar el enlace de firma a un firmante que aun no ha respondido.
description.ro: Retrimite linkul de semnare unui semnatar care nu a raspuns inca.
description.it: Resend the signing link to a signer who hasn't responded yet.

description.en: Upload a document and sign it yourself. Creates an on-chain proof of authorship — ideal for sending a signed copy via email.
description.de: Lade ein Dokument hoch und unterzeichne es selbst. Erstellt einen On-Chain-Nachweis der Urheberschaft — ideal zum Versenden einer unterzeichneten Kopie per E-Mail.
description.fr: Telechargez un document et signez-le vous-meme. Cree une preuve d authenticite on-chain — ideal pour envoyer une copie signee par e-mail.
description.es: Sube un documento y firmalo tu mismo. Crea una prueba de autoria on-chain — ideal para enviar una copia firmada por correo.
description.ro: Incarca un document si semneaza-l singur. Creeaza o dovada de paternitate on-chain — ideal pentru a trimite o copie semnata prin e-mail.
description.it: Upload a document and sign it yourself. Creates an on-chain proof of authorship — ideal for sending a signed copy via email.

description.en: Review the document and confirm your signature. Your approval is permanent and tamper-proof.
description.de: Dokument prüfen und deine Signatur bestätigen. Deine Zustimmung ist dauerhaft und fälschungssicher.
description.fr: Consultez le document et confirmez votre signature. Votre validation est definitive et infalsifiable.
description.es: Revisa el documento y confirma tu firma. Tu aprobacion queda registrada de forma permanente y segura.
description.ro: Revizuieste documentul si confirma semnatura. Aprobarea ta este permanenta si nu poate fi alterata.
description.it: Review the document and confirm your signature. Your approval is permanent and tamper-proof.

description.en: See the details and current status of a signature request.
description.de: Details und aktuellen Status einer Signaturanfrage ansehen.
description.fr: Consultez les details et le statut actuel d une demande de signature.
description.es: Consulta los detalles y el estado actual de una solicitud de firma.
description.ro: Vezi detaliile si starea actuala a unei cereri de semnatura.
description.it: See the details and current status of a signature request.

title.es: Ver información de la cuenta de Solana
title.fr: Afficher les informations du compte Solana

description.en: Retrieve detailed Solana account data via the Solana JSON RPC API. Check lamport balance, SOL balance, owner program, and executable status for a wallet address. Ideal for wallet status checks, balance tracking, and account inspection on the Solana blockchain.
description.de: Rufe detaillierte Solana-Kontodaten ueber die Solana JSON RPC API ab. Pruefe Lamport-Saldo, SOL-Saldo, Owner-Programm und Executable-Status fuer eine Wallet-Adresse. Ideal fuer Wallet-Statuschecks, Saldo-Tracking und Konto-Inspektion auf der Solana-Blockchain.
description.es: Recupere datos detallados de la cuenta de Solana a través de la API Solana JSON RPC. Verifique el saldo de lamport, el saldo de SOL, el programa de propietario y el estado del ejecutable para obtener una dirección de billetera. Ideal para verificar el estado de la billetera, el seguimiento del saldo y la inspección de cuentas en la cadena de bloques de Solana.
description.fr: Récupérez les données détaillées du compte Solana via l'API Solana JSON RPC. Vérifiez le solde de Lamport, le solde SOL, le programme propriétaire et l'état de l'exécutable pour une adresse de portefeuille. Idéal pour la vérification de l'état du portefeuille, le suivi du solde et l'inspection des comptes sur la blockchain Solana.
description.ro: Preluați datele detaliate ale contului Solana prin API-ul Solana JSON RPC. Verificați soldul lamport, soldul SOL, programul proprietarului și starea executabilului pentru adresa unui portofel. Ideal pentru verificarea stării portofelului, urmărirea soldului și inspecția contului pe blockchain-ul Solana.
description.it: Recupera i dati dettagliati dell'account Solana tramite l'API Solana JSON RPC. Controlla il saldo lamport, il saldo SOL, il programma proprietario e lo stato dell'eseguibile per un indirizzo di portafoglio. Ideale per il controllo dello stato del portafoglio, il monitoraggio del saldo e l'ispezione dell'account sulla blockchain di Solana.

description.en: Discover NFTs owned by a Solana wallet using the Solana JSON RPC API. Filters SPL token accounts to NFT-like assets (0 decimals, amount > 0) to provide a quick NFT overview.
description.de: Entdecke NFTs, die von einer Solana-Wallet gehalten werden, ueber die Solana JSON RPC API. Filtert SPL-Tokenkonten zu NFT-aehnlichen Assets (0 Dezimalstellen, Menge > 0) fuer einen schnellen NFT-Ueberblick.
description.es: Descubra los NFT propiedad de una billetera Solana utilizando la API Solana JSON RPC. Filtra cuentas de tokens SPL a activos similares a NFT (0 decimales, cantidad > 0) para proporcionar una descripción general rápida de NFT.
description.fr: Découvrez les NFT appartenant à un portefeuille Solana à l'aide de l'API Solana JSON RPC. Filtre les comptes de jetons SPL en actifs de type NFT (0 décimales, montant > 0) pour fournir un aperçu rapide de NFT.
description.ro: Descoperiți NFT-uri deținute de un portofel Solana folosind API-ul Solana JSON RPC. Filtrează conturile de token SPL la active asemănătoare NFT (0 zecimale, sumă > 0) pentru a oferi o imagine de ansamblu rapidă a NFT.
description.it: Scopri gli NFT posseduti da un portafoglio Solana utilizzando l'API Solana JSON RPC. Filtra gli account token SPL in asset simili a NFT (0 decimali, importo > 0) per fornire una rapida panoramica NFT.

description.en: List SPL token accounts for a Solana wallet using the Solana JSON RPC API. See token mints, balances, and decimals to track your token portfolio on the Solana blockchain.
description.de: Liste SPL-Tokenkonten fuer eine Solana-Wallet ueber die Solana JSON RPC API. Sieh Token-Mints, Salden und Dezimalstellen, um dein Token-Portfolio auf der Solana-Blockchain zu verfolgen.
description.es: Enumere las cuentas de token SPL para una billetera Solana utilizando la API Solana JSON RPC. Vea mentas de tokens, saldos y decimales para realizar un seguimiento de su cartera de tokens en la cadena de bloques de Solana.
description.fr: Répertoriez les comptes de jetons SPL pour un portefeuille Solana à l'aide de l'API Solana JSON RPC. Consultez les monnaies, les soldes et les décimales des jetons pour suivre votre portefeuille de jetons sur la blockchain Solana.
description.ro: Listați conturile de simbol SPL pentru un portofel Solana folosind API-ul Solana JSON RPC. Vedeți monetări, solduri și zecimale pentru a vă urmări portofoliul de simboluri pe blockchain-ul Solana.
description.it: Elenca gli account token SPL per un portafoglio Solana utilizzando l'API Solana JSON RPC. Visualizza le zecche, i saldi e i decimali dei token per tenere traccia del tuo portafoglio di token sulla blockchain di Solana.

description.en: Count recent transaction signatures for a Solana wallet using the Solana JSON RPC API. Uses getSignaturesForAddress with a configurable limit to estimate recent activity.
description.de: Zaehle aktuelle Transaktionssignaturen fuer eine Solana-Wallet ueber die Solana JSON RPC API. Nutzt getSignaturesForAddress mit einem konfigurierbaren Limit, um die aktuelle Aktivitaet zu schaetzen.
description.es: Cuente las firmas de transacciones recientes para una billetera Solana utilizando la API Solana JSON RPC. Utiliza getSignaturesForAddress con un límite configurable para estimar la actividad reciente.
description.fr: Comptez les signatures de transactions récentes pour un portefeuille Solana à l'aide de l'API Solana JSON RPC. Utilise getSignaturesForAddress avec une limite configurable pour estimer l'activité récente.
description.ro: Numărați semnăturile recente ale tranzacțiilor pentru un portofel Solana folosind API-ul Solana JSON RPC. Utilizează getSignaturesForAddress cu o limită configurabilă pentru a estima activitatea recentă.
description.it: Conta le firme delle transazioni recenti per un portafoglio Solana utilizzando l'API Solana JSON RPC. Utilizza getSignaturesForAddress con un limite configurabile per stimare l'attività recente.

title.es: Ver el historial de transacciones de Solana
title.it: Visualizza la cronologia delle transazioni Solana

description.en: Retrieve recent transaction signatures for a Solana wallet via the Solana JSON RPC API. Inspect signatures, slots, and block times to track wallet activity on the Solana blockchain.
description.de: Rufe aktuelle Transaktionssignaturen fuer eine Solana-Wallet ueber die Solana JSON RPC API ab. Pruefe Signaturen, Slots und Blockzeiten, um Wallet-Aktivitaet auf der Solana-Blockchain zu verfolgen.
description.es: Recupere firmas de transacciones recientes para una billetera Solana a través de la API Solana JSON RPC. Inspeccione firmas, ranuras y tiempos de bloqueo para rastrear la actividad de la billetera en la cadena de bloques de Solana.
description.fr: Récupérez les signatures de transactions récentes pour un portefeuille Solana via l'API Solana JSON RPC. Inspectez les signatures, les emplacements et les temps de blocage pour suivre l'activité du portefeuille sur la blockchain Solana.
description.ro: Preluați semnăturile recente ale tranzacțiilor pentru un portofel Solana prin API-ul Solana JSON RPC. Inspectați semnăturile, sloturile și orele de blocare pentru a urmări activitatea portofelului pe blockchain-ul Solana.
description.it: Recupera le firme delle transazioni recenti per un portafoglio Solana tramite l'API RPC Solana JSON. Ispeziona firme, slot e tempi di blocco per tenere traccia dell'attività del portafoglio sulla blockchain di Solana.

description.en: Burn (destroy) SPL tokens from your token account using the Solana Token Program. Permanently removes tokens from circulation by reducing the supply.
description.de: Verbrenne (zerstoere) SPL-Token aus deinem Token-Konto mit dem Solana Token Program. Entfernt Token dauerhaft aus dem Umlauf durch Verringerung des Angebots.
description.es: Grabe (destruya) tokens SPL de su cuenta de tokens utilizando el programa de tokens Solana. Elimina permanentemente los tokens de la circulación al reducir la oferta.
description.fr: Gravez (détruisez) les jetons SPL de votre compte de jetons à l'aide du programme de jetons Solana. Supprime définitivement les jetons de la circulation en réduisant l'offre.
description.ro: Ardeți (distrugeți) jetoane SPL din contul dvs. de jetoane folosind programul Solana Token. Elimină definitiv jetoanele din circulație prin reducerea aprovizionării.
description.it: Masterizza (distruggi) token SPL dal tuo account token utilizzando il Solana Token Program. Rimuove permanentemente i token dalla circolazione riducendone l'offerta.

description.en: Revoke a delegate's approval to spend tokens from your token account using the Solana Token Program. Removes any previously granted spending permission.
description.de: Widerrufe die Genehmigung eines Delegierten, Token aus deinem Token-Konto ueber das Solana Token Program auszugeben. Entfernt jede zuvor erteilte Ausgabegenehmigung.
description.es: Revocar la aprobación de un delegado para gastar tokens de su cuenta de tokens mediante el Programa de tokens de Solana. Elimina cualquier permiso de gasto previamente otorgado.
description.fr: Révoquez l'approbation d'un délégué pour dépenser des jetons de votre compte de jetons à l'aide du programme de jetons Solana. Supprime toute autorisation de dépense précédemment accordée.
description.ro: Revocați aprobarea unui delegat de a cheltui jetoane din contul dvs. de jetoane utilizând programul Solana Token. Elimină orice permisiunea de cheltuieli acordată anterior.
description.it: Revoca l'approvazione di un delegato per spendere token dal tuo account token utilizzando il Solana Token Program. Rimuove qualsiasi autorizzazione di spesa precedentemente concessa.

description.en: Transfer an SPL token to another address on Solana. Supports any SPL token by specifying the mint address. Automatically creates the recipient's associated token account if needed.
description.de: Uebertrage einen SPL-Token an eine andere Adresse auf Solana. Unterstuetzt jeden SPL-Token durch Angabe der Mint-Adresse. Erstellt automatisch das zugehoerige Token-Konto des Empfaengers, falls noetig.
description.es: Transfiera un token SPL a otra dirección en Solana. Admite cualquier token SPL especificando la dirección de menta. Crea automáticamente la cuenta token asociada del destinatario si es necesario.
description.fr: Transférez un jeton SPL vers une autre adresse sur Solana. Prend en charge n'importe quel jeton SPL en spécifiant l'adresse d'origine. Crée automatiquement le compte de jeton associé au destinataire si nécessaire.
description.ro: Transferați un token SPL la o altă adresă pe Solana. Acceptă orice simbol SPL prin specificarea adresei monetării. Creează automat contul de token asociat destinatarului, dacă este necesar.
description.it: Trasferisci un token SPL a un altro indirizzo su Solana. Supporta qualsiasi token SPL specificando l'indirizzo conio. Crea automaticamente l'account token associato al destinatario, se necessario.

description.de: Suche und durchstöbere Musik, Künstler, Alben und Playlists auf Spotify. Erhalte Track-Details, Künstler-Infos und Playlist-Inhalte über die Spotify Web API.

description.it: Crea una fattura per un ordine di lavoro. Prende il contatto e gli ID di prodotti/servizi associati e genera una fattura con link di pagamento.
description.ro: Creează o factură pentru un ordin de lucru. Preia contactul și ID-urile produselor/serviciilor asociate și generează o factură cu link de plată.

description.es: Intercambia USDC por WEGLD (Wrapped EGLD) en xExchange Devnet. WEGLD es el equivalente tokenizado de EGLD nativo y se puede desenvolver 1:1 en cualquier momento. Ingresa al ecosistema MultiversX desde tus tenencias de USDC.
description.fr: Échangez USDC contre WEGLD (Wrapped EGLD) sur xExchange Devnet. WEGLD est l'équivalent tokenisé de l'EGLD natif et peut être déballé 1:1 à tout moment. Entrez dans l'écosystème MultiversX à partir de vos avoirs USDC.
description.ro: Schimbă USDC în WEGLD (Wrapped EGLD) pe xExchange Devnet. WEGLD este echivalentul tokenizat al EGLD-ului nativ și poate fi dezvăluit 1:1 oricând. Intră în ecosistemul MultiversX din deținerile tale USDC.
description.it: Scambia USDC in WEGLD (Wrapped EGLD) su xExchange Devnet. WEGLD è l'equivalente tokenizzato di EGLD nativo e può essere unwrappato 1:1 in qualsiasi momento. Entra nell'ecosistema MultiversX dalle tue partecipazioni USDC.

description.en: Crypto & Fiat payment platform
description.de: Crypto & Fiat Zahlungsplattform

install.summary: Connect xMoney to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
examplePrompts: List the xMoney tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication xMoney needs before I run an action.
Use xMoney to help me with the task I describe next.
usageNotes: Every listed action becomes an MCP tool when the app server is connected.
Prefer the generated provider plugin when one is available, and fall back to the raw MCP URL otherwise.
authPrerequisites: Some actions require provider credentials or OAuth on first use.

reviewerNotes: This app wraps xMoney's public warp actions behind JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
The generated submission bundle is ready for runtime validation even when marketplace screenshots have not been attached yet.
testPrompts: List the xMoney tools available in this app.
What authentication does xMoney require before you can use it?
Use the best xMoney tool for the task I describe next.
review.demoFlow: Connect the hosted MCP URL, authenticate if prompted, then call one of the listed app actions.
review.credentialsReference: Use the same provider credentials or OAuth flow that the underlying warp actions already require.

claude.title: Claude Plugin
claude.description: Add the official JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this app plugin by name.

primaryAction.label: Copy marketplace command
primaryAction.value: claude plugin marketplace add --scope user JoAiHQ/claude-plugins

notes: Add the JoAi Claude marketplace once, then install this plugin by name.

codex.title: Codex Plugin
codex.description: Install this app from the official JoAi Codex marketplace, or use the MCP URL if your Codex build still relies on direct MCP setup.
notes: Add the JoAi Codex marketplace in Codex first, then install this plugin by name.

cursor.title: Cursor Plugin
cursor.description: Install this app in Cursor with one click, or fall back to the hosted MCP URL manually.
notes: The one-click install opens Cursor directly with this app prefilled.

openai.title: ChatGPT App
openai.description: Use this app in ChatGPT today by connecting the hosted MCP URL.
notes: Paste the hosted MCP URL into ChatGPT to connect the app today.

description.en: Create a crypto payment link with xMoney to accept payments for invoices, products, or services. Share the link with customers to collect cryptocurrency payments quickly and securely through the xMoney merchant platform.
description.de: Erstelle einen Krypto-Zahlungslink mit xMoney, um Zahlungen fuer Rechnungen, Produkte oder Dienstleistungen zu akzeptieren. Teile den Link mit Kunden, um Kryptozahlungen schnell und sicher ueber die xMoney-Haendlerplattform einzuziehen.
description.es: Create a crypto payment link with xMoney to accept payments for invoices, products, or services. Share the link with customers to collect cryptocurrency payments quickly and securely through the xMoney merchant platform.
description.fr: Create a crypto payment link with xMoney to accept payments for invoices, products, or services. Share the link with customers to collect cryptocurrency payments quickly and securely through the xMoney merchant platform.
description.ro: Create a crypto payment link with xMoney to accept payments for invoices, products, or services. Share the link with customers to collect cryptocurrency payments quickly and securely through the xMoney merchant platform.
description.it: Create a crypto payment link with xMoney to accept payments for invoices, products, or services. Share the link with customers to collect cryptocurrency payments quickly and securely through the xMoney merchant platform.

description.en: NFT marketplace and DeFi platform on MultiversX. Trade NFTs and access liquid staking services on the eGold ecosystem.
description.de: NFT-Marktplatz und DeFi-Plattform auf MultiversX. Handele NFTs und nutze Liquid Staking-Dienste im eGold-Ökosystem.
