description.en: Claim your eGold (EGLD) staking rewards from XOXNO.
description.de: Fordere deine eGold (EGLD) Staking-Belohnungen von XOXNO ein.
description.es: Claim your eGold (EGLD) staking rewards from XOXNO.
description.fr: Claim your eGold (EGLD) staking rewards from XOXNO.
description.ro: Claim your eGold (EGLD) staking rewards from XOXNO.
description.it: Claim your eGold (EGLD) staking rewards from XOXNO.

description.en: Stake eGold using Xoxno liquid staking to earn rewards. Receive liquid staking tokens that represent your staked position and can be used in DeFi protocols while earning staking rewards.
description.de: Stake eGold mit Xoxno Liquid Staking, um Belohnungen zu verdienen. Erhalte Liquid Staking-Token, die deine gestakte Position repräsentieren und in DeFi-Protokollen verwendet werden können, während du Staking-Belohnungen verdienst.
description.es: Stake eGold using Xoxno liquid staking to earn rewards. Receive liquid staking tokens that represent your staked position and can be used in DeFi protocols while earning staking rewards.
description.fr: Stake eGold using Xoxno liquid staking to earn rewards. Receive liquid staking tokens that represent your staked position and can be used in DeFi protocols while earning staking rewards.
description.ro: Stake eGold using Xoxno liquid staking to earn rewards. Receive liquid staking tokens that represent your staked position and can be used in DeFi protocols while earning staking rewards.
description.it: Stake eGold using Xoxno liquid staking to earn rewards. Receive liquid staking tokens that represent your staked position and can be used in DeFi protocols while earning staking rewards.

description.en: Unstake liquid staking tokens to initiate the withdrawal process. You will receive unstake tokens that can be redeemed for eGold after the unbonding period. Instant withdrawals may be available if liquidity is sufficient.
description.de: Entstake Liquid Staking-Token, um den Auszahlungsprozess zu starten. Du erhältst Entstake-Token, die nach der Unbonding-Periode gegen eGold eingelöst werden können. Sofortige Auszahlungen können verfügbar sein, wenn Liquidität ausreicht.
description.es: Unstake liquid staking tokens to initiate the withdrawal process. You will receive unstake tokens that can be redeemed for eGold after the unbonding period. Instant withdrawals may be available if liquidity is sufficient.
description.fr: Unstake liquid staking tokens to initiate the withdrawal process. You will receive unstake tokens that can be redeemed for eGold after the unbonding period. Instant withdrawals may be available if liquidity is sufficient.
description.ro: Unstake liquid staking tokens to initiate the withdrawal process. You will receive unstake tokens that can be redeemed for eGold after the unbonding period. Instant withdrawals may be available if liquidity is sufficient.
description.it: Unstake liquid staking tokens to initiate the withdrawal process. You will receive unstake tokens that can be redeemed for eGold after the unbonding period. Instant withdrawals may be available if liquidity is sufficient.

description.en: Withdraw your eGold after the unbonding period has passed. Send your unstake tokens to claim the underlying eGold. The unbonding period must be complete before withdrawal is possible.
description.de: Hebe dein eGold ab, nachdem die Unbonding-Periode abgelaufen ist. Sende deine Entstake-Token, um das zugrunde liegende eGold zu erhalten. Die Unbonding-Periode muss abgeschlossen sein, bevor eine Auszahlung möglich ist.
description.es: Withdraw your eGold after the unbonding period has passed. Send your unstake tokens to claim the underlying eGold. The unbonding period must be complete before withdrawal is possible.
description.fr: Withdraw your eGold after the unbonding period has passed. Send your unstake tokens to claim the underlying eGold. The unbonding period must be complete before withdrawal is possible.
description.ro: Withdraw your eGold after the unbonding period has passed. Send your unstake tokens to claim the underlying eGold. The unbonding period must be complete before withdrawal is possible.
description.it: Withdraw your eGold after the unbonding period has passed. Send your unstake tokens to claim the underlying eGold. The unbonding period must be complete before withdrawal is possible.

description.en: Stake your EGLD with XOXNO, a leading NFT marketplace and validator on MultiversX. Earn staking rewards while supporting the team behind one of the blockchain's most active ecosystem projects.
